programme.title: Golmaal: Fun Unlimited
programme.desc: The story revolves around the lives of four guys named Gopal, Lucky, Madhav, and Laxman who all absurdly fall for the same girl. Hence, begins the hilarious race to win her heart.

programme.title: Hum Hain Rahi Pyar Ke
programme.desc: Rahul is heavily indebted and has to bring up his two notorious nephews and a niece. One day, the kids go to a carnival and befriend a runaway bride. Trouble ensues when they decide to help her by bringing her home and keep her out of Rahul's sight.

programme.title: Baatein Kahi Ankahi
programme.desc: Watch Baatein Kahi Ankahi with RJ Anmol In An Exclusive Interview With Bollywood Stars.

programme.title: Bluff Master
programme.desc: Ashok, a smooth-talking con-artist, aspires to lead a life of honesty, when he falls in love with Seema. However, when his past is exposed to Seema, he must not only try to win his lady love back but also protect her from the ghosts of his past.

programme.title: Dil Jo Na Keh Saka
programme.desc: The story revolves around two childhood friends, go their separate ways in pursuit of their dreams. Coincidentally, they return to their hometown and meet after a long separation only to realize that they were missing each other.

programme.title: Deewaar: Let's Bring Our Heroes Home
programme.desc: A group of Indian POW (Prisoners of War) from the 1971 Indo-Pak war rebels against the Pakistani army and tries to escape from their captivity. Helping the group in the mission is Gaurav, the son of a former Army Major also held captive by the enemy.

programme.title: Golmaal: Fun Unlimited
programme.desc: The story revolves around the lives of four guys named Gopal, Lucky, Madhav, and Laxman who all absurdly fall for the same girl. Hence, begins the hilarious race to win her heart.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: A Windsor Wedding
programme.desc: You are invited to the most anticipated royal event of the year. The long awaited wedding of Great Britain's Prince Harry and American actress, activist and sweetheart Meghan Markle. Featuring the complete first ever public interview of the couple together on 27th November 2017, it also features testimonials and interviews from the people who know them the best. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: The Next Step
programme.desc: On January 8, 2020, The Duke and Duchess of Sussex made a shocking announcement that sent ripples around the world: they were leaving the Royal Family. To many, this sudden headline came as an overwhelming surprise, but many devoted royal watchers have seen the signs for some time. It seems like Harry and Meghan have just decided that the time and place--is now. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: The Price Of Freedom
programme.desc: Harry and Meghan's decision to leave royal life behind was far and away from the stiff upper lip announcements of the past. This was a royal family feud that had gone completely out of control. Now for the first time, we're taking a look behind the headlines at a version of events few of us got the chance to hear. This is the other side of the Sussex's story from alleged sources close to the couple and recently disclosed accounts. Was there ever a chance this mould-breaking couple would just fit in or was freedom the goal from the start? Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: The Revelations
programme.desc: Ever since the former Duke and Duchess of Sussex left royal life for Los Angeles, tension has been mounting between the two households. Too many questions remained unanswered as the newly-independent couple built their new life together. The world would receive the answers and so much more than they ever imagined after an explosive interview rocked the world and left the Royal Family on the brink of disaster. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: The Royal Wedding
programme.desc: Relive the magic of one of the most memorable weddings in history- the marriage of Prince Harry and Meghan Markle. From the fanfare to the first kiss and star-studded guest-list; see all the best moments from Harry and Meghan's historic wedding day. With footage from inside the St. George's chapel we bring to you the moments from the very heart of the royal wedding coverage. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: Two Became Three
programme.desc: Life hasn't slowed down since their happily ever after. Now the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are officially a family as they announce the birth of their new son, Archie Harrison Mountbatten-Windsor. Celebrate this momentous occasion and get up close and personal with one of the most beloved couples in the world as the continue to break all the rules and reshape the British Royal Family for the modern age. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: Your Royal Invitation
programme.desc: You are invited to the most anticipated royal event of the year. The long-awaited wedding of Great Britain's Prince Harry and American actress, activist and sweetheart Meghan Markle. On November 27th, 2017 the couple will be in Windsor Castle. This show follows the build-up to the big day. We'll inspect the plans, uncover how this is going to be, and chart Meghan's journey from young star to Royal Princess. Including interviews with royal experts, people who know them best, and the couple themselves. May 19th 2018. Remember the date. Because this is Your Royal Invitation. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: Elton John: A Life In Song
programme.desc: Elton John's career has spanned decades, but his legacy is more than just his music. Reginald Dwight's early debut was in the band Bluesology - there he would meet lyricist Bernie Taupin whom he would go on to write over 30 albums with. After parting ways with the band and his birth name, the Rocketman was born. Directed by Finlay Bald.

programme.title: Elvis & Priscilla: Conditional Love
programme.desc: Elvis and Priscilla are one of the most famous celebrity couples of all time. But the story that lies beneath the glamorous facade is more toxic than what first meets the eye. Elvis has defined Pricilla's life. His comment that she was "young enough that he could train her any way he wanted,", in the end, came true. Though their relationship was bound by true love, what were the conditions that let it flourish? Directed by Finlay Bald.

programme.title: Scarface: The Al Capone Story
programme.desc: Al Capone - aka Scarface - is the most infamous gangster of all time. In the Roaring Twenties, Al Capone ruled an empire of crime in the Windy City: gambling, prostitution, bootlegging, bribery, narcotics trafficking, robbery, "protection" rackets, and murder. And it seemed that law enforcement couldn't touch him. That was until one fatal night in 1929. Directed by Finlay Bald.

programme.title: Hitler's Last Days
programme.desc: Germany is in decline. Once the world's most powerful country is now being devastated by WW2. Adolf Hitler has gone into hiding. The dreaded ruler is no longer openly supporting his people. He is slowly losing his mind. This documentary gives insight into the last days of Hitler’s life as well as his death. With expert contributors like Guy Walters and Dr. Lisa Pine, this project uncovers an intriguing perspective on history. Directed by Daria Tuca.

programme.title: Princess Diana: Unexpected Icon
programme.desc: Diana Spencer was that quiet shy girl who every young lady could relate to. The difference with her is that she became a princess. From then on she shot up into stardom to become one of the biggest icons, not only in the UK, but in the entire world. Directed by Nick Randall.

programme.title: The Barbie Story
programme.desc: Barbie is way more than just a 12-inches long piece of plastic, she is way more than a toy. The legendary blond bombshell has grown into a phenomenon and a children's sensation. Wildly revolutionary, Barbie broke barriers, shattered glass ceilings, and has inspired countless dreams, wonder and imagination. The history of the doll is a testament to its enduring appeal and impact. Things have changed for her the same way things changed for women. Whatever we may think about Barbie - love or loathe her - it is impossible to ignore her worldwide impact. Let's step into the beautiful world of Barbie and take a look at her cultural revolution through the decades. Directed by Roxane Schlumberger.

programme.title: I Am (Not) A Monster
programme.desc: In this impossible journey searching for the origins of knowledge, discover how our thinking and actions can render monsters. - A most urgent film unravelling some of the reasons why Trump, Le Pen and others have captured people’s imaginations by reviving past ideologies. Directed by Ben Hayoun-Stépanian.

programme.title: Kobe Bryant: A Tribute
programme.desc: The sudden and tragic passing of Kobe Bryant, alongside his young daughter Gianna left the world in a stunned silence. Never before has a sporting star held such high esteem outside of their profession… But Kobe Bryant was a superstar. Unmatched on the basketball court and cherished on the red carpet– Kobe’s dedication to his career, his family and his charity work led to him being adored the world over. Directed by Danielle Winter.

programme.title: Pack & Soul : Disconnection Censored
programme.desc: Episode 1 - Disconnection. The start of a 2,193 mile journey on the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: Pack & Soul : Disintegration Censored
programme.desc: Episode 2 - Disintegration. Hollywood hikes into potential devastation on the trail.

programme.title: Pack & Soul : Perception Censored
programme.desc: Episode 3 - Perception. Hollywood is back on trail with something to prove.

programme.title: Pack & Soul : Negotiation Censored
programme.desc: Episode 4 - Negotiation. Hollywood finds a deeper meaning to the trail.

programme.title: Pack & Soul : Habitation Censored
programme.desc: Episode 5 - Habitation. Hollywood finds steady footing on trail, carving his name beside all who have come before.

programme.title: Pack & Soul : Revelation Censored
programme.desc: Episode 6 - Revelation. Hollywood turns inward. Through the lives and stories of others, he finds what's truly needed to get to Maine.

programme.title: In My Own Words
programme.sub-title: In My Own Words: Little Big
programme.desc: DOCUMENTARY+ invited Ilya Prusikin to share their personal story. Ilya is a musician, songwriter, and lead vocalist of the Russian pop-rave superband, Little Big. Ilya recounts the on the ground events of February 24th, the day Russia invaded Ukraine, the group's journey to seek political asylum in the United States, and navigating being labeled a traitor by the Russian government for being outspoken against the war. Directed by Yasir Masood.

programme.title: Taylor Swift: Superstar
programme.desc: Taylor Swift completed her transition from country star to pop superstar. With exclusive interviews and footage, discover the remarkable story of the most powerful woman in Pop Music. Directed by Billy Simpson

programme.title: Travis Kelce: Sharp, Sturdy, Swift
programme.desc: Blessed with God-given talent, genes and mentality, Travis Kelce forged his name in the annals of American sporting achievements. As his life takes on another twist in the form of T. Swift, we take a look back at the journey of one of NFL’s greats. Directed by Nick Randall.

programme.title: Taylor Swift: Superstar
programme.desc: Taylor Swift completed her transition from country star to pop superstar. With exclusive interviews and footage, discover the remarkable story of the most powerful woman in Pop Music. Directed by Billy Simpson

programme.title: Travis Kelce: Sharp, Sturdy, Swift
programme.desc: Blessed with God-given talent, genes and mentality, Travis Kelce forged his name in the annals of American sporting achievements. As his life takes on another twist in the form of T. Swift, we take a look back at the journey of one of NFL’s greats. Directed by Nick Randall.

programme.title: The Taylor Swift Story: Dare To Dream
programme.desc: The incredible journey of Taylor Swift all began with a girl, a guitar and a dream. Taylor Swift is a ten time Grammy winner, and the youngest recipient in history of the music industry’s highest honor, follow the story of an artist who turned a childhood dream into an empire. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: The Longest Week
programme.desc: When Conrad is kicked out and cut off at the age of forty, he crashes with his only friend and falls in love with his friend�s girlfriend

programme.title: I'll Be Homeless For Christmas
programme.desc: When a petty thief learns that his latest mark is a struggling single mother who works at a homeless shelter, he decides to use his savvy street smarts to make this Christmas one to remember for her and her young son.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Sixty-four-year-old Josie says she met the love of her life, Victor, on Facebook. Even though he’s Nigerian, 30 years younger, and she’s never physically met him, she insists it’s true love. She’s purchased a ticket to Nigeria and hopes to marry Victor, but her older sister, Carmen, her best friend, Angela, and her 19-year-old son, Anthony, say Josie is acting like a teenage fool. They believe Victor is conning Josie into marrying him for a green card. Dr. Phil took cameras to Nigeria to find Victor to see if he’s telling Josie the truth. Josie’s family says they want Dr. Phil to convince Josie that this relationship will never work. Is Victor who he says he is, and will Josie leave for Nigeria after hearing what Dr. Phil has to say?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents terrified that their kids are headed down a destructive path turn to Dr. Phil for some advice. Shelly says that her 15-year-old daughter, Allie, was the perfect child before partying and drinking took over her life. Allie has been cited several times for public intoxication, and also has been caught stealing prescription drugs. Shelly fears her daughter won't make it to her 18th birthday. Dr. Phil wants Allie to meet someone who could leave a lasting impression. Then, Kim is scared that her 16-year-old daughter, Briana, has unprotected sex with older men. Dr. Phil gives Briana a wake-up call she'll never forget. And, a teen who has spent over 400 hours in tanning beds says she’s not concerned about the health risks.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents: How do you sound an alarm when your out-of-control teenager thinks he or she is invincible? When 16-year-old Chris and 19-year-old Brett last appeared on the show, they said they were just acting like normal teens drinking, smoking marijuana and vandalizing property. They say jail is a joke, but with the help of Dr. Phil, they find out that life behind bars is no laughing matter.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Monica and Lloyd say they’re devastated that their 19-year-old daughter, Jamie Lynn, is dating Shawn, a 41-year-old man. Jamie Lynn is an aspiring singer, living on her own and performing in bars. Her parents don’t approve of her lifestyle and especially her choice in a boyfriend. When the family dug into Shawn’s past, they were shocked at what they discovered and refused to meet him. Jamie Lynn says she’s old enough to make her own decisions and if her family makes her choose, she will choose Shawn. Shawn says he would never hurt Jamie Lynn and can’t believe her parents are judging him without even meeting him. Hear from Jamie Lynn’s sister, who did meet Shawn, and why she says she came away feeling sick. How can this family close the rift that’s tearing them apart?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Robert and Crystan turn to Dr. Phil, desperate for help with their 14-year-old daughter, Hannah. They say their beautiful, sweet girl has turned into an angry, out-of-control teen, and they think their family is on the brink of disaster. Hannah has been caught shoplifting, accused of arson, has run away for weeks, pulled a knife on her father and threatened to have her parents killed. These frustrated parents say they’re forced to call the police for help several times a month. Hannah says her father is abusive and frequently hits her. Why does Robert say he’s had to “whoop” his daughter? Can Dr. Phil intervene before someone gets seriously hurt, and can this family heal?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Fifteen-year-old Madisen says she wants desperately for a place to belong and has made terrible choices in an attempt to do just that. She claims to have already joined a gang, gotten pregnant and hit a teacher. Everyone, even Madisen, agrees she is troubled, but why does Dr. Phil say it would’ve been a bigger surprise if she didn't turn out this way? Did her father really try to forfeit his parental rights? And did her mother turn a blind eye to so many red flags? Learn why Dr. Phil believes it’s not too late for this teen.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When Madisen first appeared on Dr. Phil her family had reached a breaking point with her defiant and outrageous behavior. Months later, after completing her program at a residential treatment facility for troubled teens, Madisen returns to the Dr. Phil stage to show off her amazing transformation. The 15-year-old says she’s ready to return home, but is home ready for her?

programme.title: Above The Law
programme.desc: The North American edit of "Righting Wrongs" (1986): Yuen Biao plays Jason Chan, a lawyer angry at the way the law seems to protect the bad guys. He decides to take the law into his own hands when a key witness and his entire family are murdered. But Cindy Si is soon on his case and it all spirals into a situation only a few will survive.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Sarasota, FL officers place a hostile former Marine in isolation. In Portland, OR officers take a man into custody for joyriding in a stolen car. In Las Vegas, NV a jailed man is more concerned about the condition of his car rather than the people involved in the accident that was hospitalized.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man admits to urinating in public. A couple spends their date night in jail after being over served, and a DUI suspect passes out during booking.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Officers outwit a man who refuses to give his name. A repeat DUI offender is jailed yet again. An intoxicated man is taken into custody and once the alcohol wears off he reveals that he’s broken his sobriety.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A Batman impressionist is arrested after punching Chewbacca. A broken arm doesn’t stop a woman from struggling with officers. A man finds out it’s better to pay the fine then do the time. A woman involved in an affair with an older gentleman claims she was set up.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: After being arrested for domestic violence, a man is placed in restraints. An intoxicated man picks a fight with inmates over their hometown. A woman is arrested for assaulting theater guards.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An intoxicated man claims to be connected to the occupy Wall Street movement. Officers struggle with a combative man, and a tearful candy thief is taken into custody.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman is charged with possession of a controlled substance. A woman denies assaulting her husband, and two aggressive cousins threaten police and end up in isolation.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT officers break up an altercation between two inmates. In Portland, OR a belligerent man questions the authorities. In Sarasota, FL a man is busted for DUI. In Las Vegas, NV a woman is taken into custody for battery.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man fresh out of prison tries to prove how tough he is. A drunk woman rages against everyone in her path. A couple’s wedding plans are ruined after officers find their stash of meth, and an arrest leaves an elderly gentleman singing the blues after being processed for a possession charge.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: After falling down a flight of stairs while drunk, a young man is amazed he is in jail for refusing to go to the hospital. A correction officer tries to explain to a young man why carrying a gun-shaped knife is not a good idea. An expectant father is arrested after a gin-fueled rampage at his parent's house and misses the birth of his first child. A woman arrested for selling fake designer purses as real ones says she didn’t know it was a crime.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man outfitted in just his underwear is taken into custody. A dad gets busted for DUI while on his way to pick up a pizza for his kids. Officers recover drugs from a suspect’s pocket who is puzzled as to how they got there. A woman learns the hard way “what happens in Vegas stays in Vegas”.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Reno, NV a woman becomes violent with officers after having over indulged in boxed wine. In Salt Lake City, UT a drunk man is brought in for urinating in front of a family restaurant and in attempt to expedite his release he requests that the officers "git 'er done". In Reno, NV a former marine is taken in to custody for domestic abuse.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A prisoner refuses to exit his cell prompting an elaborate extraction. A man begins singing in response to his arrest. During a severe alcohol withdrawal, an inmate repeatedly escapes his restraints.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An angry man refuses to cooperate during the booking process. A man claims to be part of the “international police”.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A prostitute gets busted on a slow work day. An intoxicated inmate tangles with guards, and an angry woman has cross words for a guard.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An inmate fails to impress the staff with his witticisms. A woman boasts about excelling at her DUI field test, and a man learns his wreckless driving has resulted in the death of a man.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman gives officers a hard time in booking when she refuses to comply. A catwoman is arrested for hitting her date at a club, and a pusherman discusses his contributions to the economy.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A testy man is sent to the isolation cell to "cool off." A teary-eyed young man maintains his innocence. An inmate may have ingested contraband to avoid possession charges.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A ladies' man smuggles women's underwear into jail. A woman arrested at a traffic accident is incredulous to discover that smoking marijuana while driving is against the law. A young man charged with a DUI tells guards he fears he may become pregnant behind bars.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A secret stash is uncovered during a search at a suspect's property. Two rowdy inmates don't quite hit it off when they invade each other's personal space, and a jaywalker experiences problems keeping his pants from falling down.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Chaos surrounds a routine medical screening of an inmate. In the prison phone center, a smoking pipe is discovered and a mystery ensues. A pregnant woman is investigated over potential sex crimes.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Deputies deal with chaos after volatile inmates begin fighting. Accusations of deceit plague a booking as a woman is arrested for drunk driving. Prisoners are restrained after causing a commotion.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Wise Guys With John Tabacco
programme.desc: John Tabacco and his crew look at the big issues, shining a light on hypocrisy and dangerous policies of the elites.

programme.title: Michael Savage: Savage Nation
programme.desc: Michael Savage delivers his insights on politics, culture, faith and more as he seeks to save Western Civilization!

programme.title: David Harris Jr. The Pulse Weekly
programme.desc: David Harris Jr. delivers hard-hitting analysis and opinion of the latest news and events.

programme.title: INVASION: Border Crisis, Rob Schmitt Reports
programme.desc: Rob Schmitt hosts a special on invasion at our Southern border with exclusive access and a never-before seen look at the efforts to keep America safe.

programme.title: Voices of Valor
programme.desc: Carl Higbie sits down with three fellow veterans to discuss topics like the failures of the VA, how weak American society has become, and the difficulties veterans face when returning to civilian life.

programme.title: 4-4-43: The Greatest Story Ever Told – The War in The Pacific
programme.desc: 10 American POWs and two Filipino convicts do the impossible during WWII -- breaking out of an escape-proof Imperial Japanese prison plantation.

programme.title: The Greatest Generals
programme.desc: Douglas MacArthur's life in the army - from cradle, his dad was an army general, to grave. Douglas, a five-star general, was a leading figure of the 20th Century and World War II .

programme.title: Zulu Dawn
programme.desc: Taking the Zulu's defiant stance on tribal customs as a declaration of war, the British commander sends hundreds of British troops to squash the African warriors. Cast: Burt Lancaster, Peter O'Toole, Simon Ward

programme.title: The President’s Men: Tales From the Secret Service
programme.desc: Protecting presidents and their families is the job of the brave men and women of the US Secret Service. They'd take a bullet! Their stories give a glimpse into the lives of the leaders of the free world. Based on Ronald Kessler's best-selling book.

programme.title: Tarantino Loves Movies
programme.desc: Interviews with Quentin Tarantino and the casts of "Once Upon a Time...in Hollywood” and “The Hateful Eight.”

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: It’s all about Cougars! No, not that kind of Cougar... the kind with 4 wheels and a legendary pedigree! After a short history lesson about how these cars came into existence and why they were so cool, Stacey rolls the V8 Interceptor back into the shop and digs into the final assembly of this wild ’67 Mercury Cougar. This week’s episode focuses on planning out your final assembly, and taking care of all the little details, before you put the big things in like engine and transmission. Whether it’s planning out your brake system, battery location, or running fuel lines, Stacey shows how a little extra time in the planning department will make all the difference in your build.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey takes us through the history of the legendary SR-71 Blackbird. If you’re not familiar with this bird, it could fly mach 3.2, cruise at 80,000 feet and kept our country safe through its many reconnaissance missions. Never shot down, and never outrun, it was the hot rod of the sky! Stacey gets to sit down with pilot Lt. Col. Ed Yeilding and talk about his record setting transcontinental flight—Coast to Coast in 67 minutes and 54 seconds! The iconic Blackbird was such an inspiration that you know Stacey had to make a vehicle inspired by and paying tribute to it, so get ready to meet the SR-71 Rapid Tool Express!!!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.sub-title: Catalog Camaro Butt Lift and Tummy Tuck
programme.desc: The Catalog Camaro is back in the garage and ready to go under the knife as Stacey shows how to do a butt lift and tummy tuck on a 2nd generation Camaro. What does that mean? Well, last season Stacey performed a nose job on this old ’81 Camaro to show how easy it is to get rid of the 80’s plastic front bumpers and put on the classic early 70’s split-bumper, rally sport front sheetmetal. This week he continues the makeover by losing the plastic rear bumper and wrap-around taillights and grafting in the early 70’s quarter panels, round taillights and chrome bumper. It’s more in depth than the front and definitely requires some skilled metal surgery, but Stacey shows you all the tricks on how to do it properly. So, sit back and enjoy the ride as Stacey details how to measure, cut, and weld your way to a much younger looking Camaro.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey rolls in a Big Bad Buick Riviera and shows you what is possible with the right vehicle and some bolt on parts. This 1972 Riviera is a great entry-level project that won’t break the bank, and has the potential to serve some serious humble-pie to any unsuspecting hot shot that may want to mix it up at the stoplight. As it sits, the big 455 under the hood is a force to be reckoned with, but Stacey shows what a weekend in the garage and a top end rebuild can do for a car like this! Get ready to get your hands dirty and bust a few knuckles as Stacey pulls the old heads, intake, cam, and ignition off and replaces them with performance parts from companies like TA Performance, Edelbrock, and MSD. It’s a lesson in Buick and bolt-on horsepower, and you’re only gonna find it on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: The GearZ crew hits the road this week and travels to the Charlotte Speed Shop to see how paint prep is going on Stacey’s Cheetah Evolution Car. With the hood and side vents glassed in and smoothed out, the first coat of primer gets sprayed and this awesome cat takes one big step closer to coming home! Stacey also stops by to visit with a fellow boat tail Riviera owner and trade tips on beefing up these classic beauties. It turns out that this guy and Stacey had both been watching this same car when it came up for sale! Come hang out with us as we visit some great folks this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey gets down to business on the Big Bad Buick. With the top end engine rebuilt, the exterior and interior of the car need some serious updating. You don’t have to spend a ton of cash on simple modifications. Stacey shows what’s behind making a good clean line with your bumpers and how a simple front and rear bumper tuck can drastically change the appearance. Replacing the grille and scraping off that old vinyl top are also sure-fire ways to add attitude to this big ol’ boat tail. That old carpet has got to go! Follow along as Stacey shows the ins and outs and some tips and tricks to keep your exterior and interior redo from breaking the bank.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Not everyone out there is wrenching on an a classic. In fact, we get tons of emails from viewers who want to upgrade brand-new vehicles but aren’t sure how to get started. Well, Stacey has the answer—and it comes with a little help from our friend and NASCAR legend Jimmie Johnson and a stunning 2018 Camaro SS. Come hang out in the garage as Stacey walks you through the top seven modifications that you can make to a car that you just drove off the lot! Everything from paint upgrades to wheels, Stacey’s got a list. Let’s get started!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey’s hard at work on a 2018 Camaro SS. This build is super-cool, not only because he’s running down a list of the top seven mods you can make on a brand-new car, but also because seven-time NASCAR champion, Jimmie Johnson is involved with the project. We’ve covered paint mods, body mods, and interior mods. Now it’s time to go under the hood and under the car and talk powers gains and handling upgrades!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: With our chassis and drivetrain out of the way, it’s time to get moving on the inside of the SR-71 Rapid Tool Express. But how do you organize a bunch of tools in and empty truck? Well, the guys from Summit Bodyworks do it every day on full size Cornwell tool trucks, so it’s only natural that they lend a hand in helping layout the inside our ’59 Panel to make it cool and serviceable. After that, Stacey addresses the issue of wooden floors and beds, and shows you an aluminum floor option that you’d swear came from the forest. Finally, the crew hits the road and gets a chance to talk with top fuel drag racer Leah Pritchett about her drive to become one of the best top fuelers in the nation. From design to drag racing, we’ve got it covered, this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: The SR-71 Rapid Tool Express is really taking off! We get our custom chassis from the Roadster Shop—those guys know a thing or two about quality builds. Engine Master Jon Kaase delivers a one-of-a-kind engine to power our SR-71. This build is coming together fast! With the body back on, Stacey takes you through some of the other mods that are going to tie this build in with the SR-71 Blackbird. Get ready, ya’ll, we’ve got loads of good stuff on GearZ.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: SEMA 2017 is fast approaching and the Graveyard Ghouls are working hard on Chris Jacob’s 1969 GTX and John Buck’s 1971 Challenger with a Hellcrate Hemi. But as pressure begins to mount, Mark questions if he’ll be able to keep his promised - and ultimately - is forced to make a difficult decision.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: The Phoenix Cuda: A legendary Mopar which was incinerated and from the ashes, will be reborn at Graveyard Carz.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.sub-title: SEMA Has Eyes On A Hellbird
programme.desc: Graveyard Carz returns to conclude the epic builds of Chris Jacob’s 1968 GTX after it suffered a devastating fire, and the first of its kind 1970 Plymouth Superbird equipped with a Hellcat Crate Hemi.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: New Season, New Carz! With SEMA in their rear-view mirror, the ghouls begin the final assembly of a 1969 Plymouth GTX in Seafoam Turquoise. And when help comes up short-handed, Mark enlists what he likes to call his “Echo Bomber.”

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: It’s the 100th Episode! Join Mark and Royal and watch the never-before-aired Pilot featuring some of the first Mopar restorations the original ghouls tackled over ten-years ago.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: It’s a hectic day at the Graveyard. Dave jumps from car to car, installing and assembling what he can, Will struggles to keep focused on one project at a time, and Mark makes progress on his A100 build with the hopes of revealing at SEMA 2018!

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: Professional wrestler, actor, and former professional football player known for his time in the WWE and WCW as Goldberg returns to the Graveyard! This time, he brings the ghouls two brand new projects - one of which includes installing a brand-new 392 Crate Hemi in his modern Dodge Truck.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.sub-title: Performance with a Touch of Luxury
programme.desc: The Ghouls say goodbye to the 1970 Superbird equipped with a Hellcat Crate Hemi by taking it out for one last drive. Then it’s all hands on deck to get the beautiful second-generation Plymouth GTX in Seafoam Turquoise finished in time for the owner to see it for the first time since his father drove it.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: With a Plymouth GTX finished, the ghoulz refocus their efforts on the 1969 Dodge Daytona. With the owner wanting a full restoration, Mark and the Ghouls begin the tedious disassembly. Because of the car’s pristine condition, they take extra effort to document and preserve as much as they can.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: The unsung heroes of the body shop begin the restoration on one of the most requested renovations ever: a 1971 Dodge Demon. With several panels needing replacement, Mark and George show the intricate process of grafting an entire front-clip from another vehicle to replace the rusted and damaged original.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: It’s crunch time at Graveyard Carz, Mark and his cousin Dougie fire up the engine for our Turbine Bronze Charger while Dave assembles its firewall in preparation to install the drivetrain.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.sub-title: Look to the West for B5 Blue
programme.desc: Dave is ready to wrap up the 1970 Challenger R/T SE but is waiting for parts. Meanwhile, Mark’s A100 build continues, and after a long and tedious body-work and paint phase, Will is ready to deliver Dave the 1969 B5 Blue Plymouth GTX.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: The Ghoulz have finished the 1970 Challenger R/T SE. As they take it out for the first test drive in over 15 years, Mark and the team reflect on the trials and challenges throughout the restoration process.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: Mark, Dougie, and Allysa team up to kick things into high-gear around the shop. They begin the restoration of a Challenger T/A, Will paints a 1968 GTX in B7 Blue, Allysa learns how dashes are assembled, and they install the drivetrain for the ultra rare, 1 of 2, 1970 Hemi Convertible Coronet R/T.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: Mark pulls back the curtain on the next four Mopar’s in desperate need of resurrection while also showcasing the fans favorite moments from Seasons 8 and 9.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: Mark and the Ghouls are back, and they are ready to get to work! With a call in from the owner of the super rare 1 of 2 ever made, 1970 Coronet Hemi Convertible, Mark has to work fast to reach a looming deadline. At the same time, Will primes the body of our 1969 Daytona, bringing it one step closer to being back on the road.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: While Mark is on a road test of the just completed 1968 Charger, its owner surprises the shop by arriving in person! While the owner waits, Will completes the paint on a beautiful 1970 Challenger in B5 blue. Finally, with Mark returned the owner receives his restored Charger and cooks a meal for the Ghouls as thanks!

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: It’s time to hit the casino! Mark has been invited to a massive car show at the Little Creek Casino but before he can go there are a few things that need to be finished first. Mark and Doug disassemble the Phoenix ‘Cuda, a car that survived a massive garage fire. At the car show, Allysa and Will interact with fans and find their “pick of the show.”

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: Mark has once again taken Allysa under his wing and is teaching her the finer points of installing a grill and headlights on our 1972 Duster, meanwhile George is in the body shop attaching a tricky quarter panel to a 1969 ‘Cuda which Mark has to check off the list…military style? Finally, the Duster gets it’s drive train and is finally reunited with its engine.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: Who better to explain the history and discuss the changes, year to year, of the Dodge Charger, than the Master of Mopar himself, Mark Worman. programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Bernard gets bored trekking across the frozen Arctic wastes. Some abandoned equipment becomes a source of great entertainment, but not for long.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Zack tries to steal a parcel which Bernard is carrying. At first he succeeds, but Bernard doesn't give up that easily.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Even when he's asleep, Bernard is capable of anything – as he finds out when he wakes up in the morning.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Bernard has to deliver a pizza to a haunted house.…and to its starving owner. But how is he going to get paid?

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: To the amazement of Zack, Bernard discovers he has some performing skills which he never knew he had.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Although Bernard has been shipwrecked, his real problems begin when he finds an abandoned motorboat which could get him back to shore.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Bernard makes a daring escape from prison, but once he's out, he realises that perhaps life inside wasn't so bad after all.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Brain Candy TV
programme.desc: Early learning for a brighter future! Your children will love to learn their ABCs, numbers, colors and even some math and science with the help of our action-packed vehicles including monster trucks, dump trucks, trains and more, plus our cute dog Lizzy.

programme.title: Nutri Ventures
programme.desc: Protecting Healthy Foods At All Costs!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock’ Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it’s not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Ellie finds unlikely support on the debate team. Tensions rise as Rhyme's new friendship with Gemma blossoms.

programme.title: Total Eclipse
programme.desc: Diana, Cassie, and Jenna are desperate for the truth about Axel's true intentions.

programme.title: Total Eclipse
programme.desc: Cassie and her friends are back facing new changes while they prepare for whatever the future holds.

programme.title: Crown Lake
programme.desc: With Tiffany's secret exposed, Nellie rises up as the new head of the popular girls.

programme.title: Crown Lake
programme.desc: It may be the season finale, but the mystery is far from over.

programme.title: Zoe Valentine
programme.desc: A friend has some ulterior motives, a crush is just a misunderstanding and an enemy tries to become her ally.

programme.title: Zoe Valentine
programme.desc: Zoe sets things straight with Riggs and Boots comes clean to Isaac.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Birdie’s new relationship takes an unexpected turn. A scandal leaves everyone suspicious of Robby.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Rhyme takes on a big role in the musical. Things get spooky at Ace's Halloween party.

programme.title: Chicken Girls: College Years
programme.desc: It’s freshman year! As Rooney forms her new crew of “Chicken Girls,” Birdie finds her place while balancing old & new friendships.

programme.title: Roswell Conspiracies: Aliens, Myths and Legends
programme.desc: Ruck, the werewolves pack leader, escapes from the Alliance and tracks down the EMP bomb which the Yeti race has been hiding. The doomsday device is accidentally activated while it’s being stolen, and Logan must discover its location before time runs out.

programme.title: Roswell Conspiracies: Aliens, Myths and Legends
programme.desc: An alien satellite that has been “watching” us for fifty years collides with a NASA shuttle. Rinaker doesn’t want its secrets exposed, so he sends Logan, Blaze, Trueblood and Ti-Yet on a stolen Lycanthrope ship to retrieve the data before anyone else. Logan hopes the information might reveal information about his father.

programme.title: Roswell Conspiracies: Aliens, Myths and Legends
programme.desc: Cattle mutilation draws Logan to a small town and saddles him with a new partner, Dr. Petrovic. They discover science has spawned more trouble – hybrid, mutant, alien fire ants. Now they must rescue the townsfolk and the Detail Team before Rinaker calls an air strike on the town.

programme.title: Roswell Conspiracies: Aliens, Myths and Legends
programme.desc: Mab, Queen of the Banshees, dispatches two bullheaded Minotauri bounty hunters and a cerberus parahound after the same prize – the head of Sh’lainn Blaze.

programme.title: Roswell Conspiracies: Aliens, Myths and Legends
programme.desc: A vampire that once worked for INTRAcom has mutated and is now staging attacks on his former boss’s holdings in an effort to protect the Brazilian rain forest. The creature rescues Logan, but Rinaker calls for an air strike on a lost Vampire city rather than risk its discovery by INTRAcom.

programme.title: Dork Hunters From Outer Space
programme.desc: Five teenage friends fight against an evil alien species named the Dorks in order to retrieve some peculiar and extremely dangerous explosives called the microgalaxies.

programme.title: Highlander: The Animated Series

programme.title: Highlander: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Ramirez takes Quentin to see Stevenson, a Jettator specializing in hydroelectic power.

programme.title: Highlander: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Ramirez is teaching Quentin about balance in a fashion that should seem very familiar to fans of the original film. Nearby, the Dundees are terrorized by a gang sporting a machine gun.

programme.title: Highlander: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Ramirez takes Quentin to find Erol, but they are captured by his mortal former assistant, Melvyn.

programme.title: Highlander: The Animated Series
programme.desc: A flashback shows the death of Connor MacLeod at Kortan's hand during the Jettator ceremony.

programme.title: Kong: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Jason and Tann journey to the mysterious Kong Island with their college professor, Dr. De La Porta.

programme.title: Kong: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Professor De La Porta kidnaps Dr. Jenkins and forces her to reveal the location of the powerful Primal Stones.

programme.title: Kong: The Animated Series
programme.desc: The theft of the Primal Stones upsets the island's environmental balance, triggering earthquakes, storms and volcanoes.

programme.title: Kong: The Animated Series
programme.desc: When Lua is captured and brainwashed into releasing the ancient demon Chiros, it's up to Jason and Kong to defend the island from the evil monster.

programme.title: Kong: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Jason, Tann, Lua and Kong travel to New York to find out who is stealing ancient tablets connected to the Primal Stones.

programme.title: Dork Hunters From Outer Space
programme.desc: Five teenage friends fight against an evil alien species named the Dorks in order to retrieve some peculiar and extremely dangerous explosives called the microgalaxies.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik invents an electron altering generator which makes Scratch and Grounder twice as fast as Sonic. When they lose it and Tails picks it up, Tails speeds through the Mobius countryside leaving disasters and accidents in his wake. Seeing this, Robotnik convinces the villagers that the little fox belongs in jail, and Tails is forced to flee. With Tails all alone, Scratch and Grounder attack, and Sonic makes a last minute rescue.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a Kangaroo named MacHopper, and uses his brain-wipe-reprogramming-computer to transform him into a resourceful demolitions expert (Ala MacGiver). But Mac escapes before Robotnik installs the final Get Sonic program, and teams up with Sonic and Tails to BLAST Robotnik.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic joins up with a group of Dr. Robotnik's rejects who have been banished to the dump and helps them understand that their shortcomings were really their strengths.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When S and G rocket to outer space to mine a radioactive mineral from asteroids, Sonic and Tails stow away. Through a blunder by the robots, all are stranded in space, and Robotnik tries to blow all of them out of the stars. Sonic builds a rocket out of S and G's spare parts, and all return to Mobius.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When a Rebel Base is threatened by Robotnik, Sonic and Tails team up with Big Mike and Da Bears to run a booby-trapped gauntlet in their gigantic Road Warrior-like truck, breaking through every obstacle S and G put in their way until they save the rebels.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik pretends to retire, and lures Sonic and Tails into a phony vacation resort, laden with booby-traps set by Scratch and Grounder. But Sonic takes the bungee jumping, hang gliding, and skydiving in stride, and gives the bashes the bots.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik and a rival named Quark Rex try to cooperate in capturing Sonic. However, Sonic tricks them into becoming enemies, and they try to outdo each other.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Coconuts acquires a magic wand and magical gadgets from Wes Weasley (after agreeing to forward all payments to Robotnik), and attempts to master them. Meanwhile, Robotnik tries to change Sonic-themed mobium banknotes into Robotnik banknotes in the Mobius Mint.

programme.title: Love Shriners
programme.desc: Dynamic Media Partners - Shriners - PP SHFFT8CGTH

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Super Special Sonic Search and Smash Squad
programme.desc: When Sonic and Tails are captured by Grounder and Scratch, Sonic tricks them into letting them escape by reminiscing about how they all met. Several badniks seen early on in this episode later resurfaced in Dr. Robotnik's Mean Bean Machine.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on pursuit with Scratch and Grounder, Sonic and Tails hide in an underground mine which a miser mole think that they are trespassers.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic saves a female hedgehog from Scratch and Grounder which Sonic falls in love with, while Dr. Robotnik plans to flood a village by stealing the water from the Mobius reservoir.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic saves a female hedgehog from Scratch and Grounder which Sonic falls in love with, while Dr. Robotnik plans to flood a village by stealing the water from the Mobius reservoir.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic must save a family of sloths from Dr. Robotnik's slow-motion ray, but when he himself is slowed down by Scratch and Grounder, Tails and the sloth family must take action.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Desperate to get workers to build a Robotnik statue, Dr. Robotnik opens Casino Night Zone with his pal Smiley but when Sonic stops Scratch and Grounder, Robotnik traps Tails so Sonic has to make a choice to save his pal.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik imprisons a satirical cartoonist named Sketch Lampoon for making fun of him in his comic book, much to the anger of Sonic, his biggest fan. Sonic purposely allows his own capture as well, but does not expect to be placed in a maximum-security jail cell. With Robotnik angrily sends Sonic in the cell for interfering with his plans once again.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Scratch, Grounder and Coconuts set up a chili-dog trap which then resulted with Tails been captured by a mysterious person so Sonic has to find Tails and for Robotnik and co to capture Sonic.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Close Encounters of the Sonic Kind
programme.desc: While Scratch and Grounder try to catch Sonic using a Suction plate, two aliens, one being a prince, crash lands on Mobius. Sonic meets the prince when he finds out that the prince's baby brother would blow up Mobius which Sonic must save.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik's momma escapes from the home for mothers of villains and demands her birthday present! When she endangers Sonic and Tails, and they manage to have her taken back to the home, even Robotnik is glad to see her go.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Coconuts is exiled by Robotnik to a remote jungle, where he uses a giant baby ape to destroy villages. But Sonic exposes Coconuts as a robot, and the baby ape's real Dad takes Coconuts and the baby ape away for a spanking.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: A country and western singer released a song about Sonic which is making Dr. Robotnik mad and builds a music destroyer robot.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: An energetic salesman named Wes Weasley sells Robotnik numerous gadgets to help Scratch and Grounder capture Sonic. However, Robotnik later comes to regret it when Weaseley's gadgets keep backfiring.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails rescue Lucas, Robotnik's first prisoner, and attempt to reunite him with his girlfriend, Lucinda. However, Robotnik is also in love with Lucinda, and pursues Lucas.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: En route to stop a train of explosives from arriving at Robotnik's munition factory, Sonic and Tails must deal with a duo of bears named Big Griz and Big Mike after Scratch and Grounder tell them that Sonic and Tails are the enemies.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik takes Professor Von Schlemmer hostage and uses his growth machine to try and enlarge himself. However, the machine backfires, and enlarges Tails instead in nearby Wienerville. Sonic must keep the famished Tails from getting into more danger as Robotnik tricks the citizens into thinking that Sonic is the villain, while Robotnik is the hero planning to save the city.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic decides to find Tails a suitable foster home to ensure his safety, Robotnik finds out and creates a robot fox family, who pose as Tails' long-lost parents.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When overweight, elderly superhero Captain Rescue bungles in his attempts to help Sonic, he grows tired of his incompetence. Robotnik then uses Captain Rescue to successfully imprison Sonic in an impenetrable force field, and Tails and Captain Rescue must save him.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Scratch suffers a blow to the head and believes that he is his favorite television character, Edgar Eagle. Sonic uses this to his advantage in preventing another of Robotnik's schemes.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: There is a Sonic Appreciation Day happening where Sonic is the guest in a hotel. However, someone steals his power sneakers and now Sonic and Tails have to find the culprit.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails adopts a cute and fuzzy pet named Walter who turns out to be a black hole who sucks up everything in Mobius. Realizing that Walter is from another dimension our heroes have to return him and they soon find themselves spinning through interdimensional limbo.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik opens up a resort to make the resident Mobians his slaves, Sonic enlists the help of some robots from an area of Mobius called Scrap Valley.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik creates a robot Sonic suit with the intent of ruining the hedgehog's reputation. He forces a lab rat named Laurence to pilot by threatening his parents.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Dr. Robotnik creates a genius chip so he would have enough brains to rule Mobius, however a computer hacker got hold of it which then the chip landed inside Grounder causing him to be smart.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic leaves Tails in charge of protecting a squirrel village food supply, when he zips off to stop a dam from breaking. Robotnik sends Scratch and Grounder after Tails, who defends himself the best he can with Home Alone booby traps for Scratch and Grounder. When Tails is finally caught, Sonic speeds back to save him.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik introduces the Ultra Freeze-O-Matic, announcing his plan to freeze every citizen on Mobius so that he can install Servitude Chips into the frozen citizens and make them unquestionably obedient. Sonic and Tails must foil the scheme.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik invades Labyrinth, an underwater city, and kidnaps Princess Bubbles, a seahorse-dude named Surff seeks Sonic's help. It seems Surff and the Princess are in love, but the royal family deems Surff unworthy. Sonic, Tails and Surff must avoid the undersea traps and Mobius sea monsters while Sonic rescues the Princess and reunites her with Surff -- making it look like Surff did the whole thing.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik reprograms a machine created by Von Schlemmer capable of turning dreams into reality, unleashing a Nightmare Monster upon Mobius.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When S and G rocket to outer space to mine a radioactive mineral from asteroids, Sonic and Tails stow away. Through a blunder by the robots, all are stranded in space, and Robotnik tries to blow all of them out of the stars. Sonic builds a rocket out of S and G's spare parts, and all return to Mobius.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik's attempt to turn Sonic into an old man with his newest device backfires, turning him and Tails, and later himself, into babies. Now stuck in a day-care, the infantile Sonic and Tails must try to keep Robotnik under control, while Scratch and Grounder attempt to get him back.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik plans to block out the sun and extinguish all life and nature on the planet Mobius. Then he creates a robot son and tries to train him in the ways of wickedness. But when Robotnik Jr. meets Sonic, he becomes a naturalist and teams up with Sonic to thwart Robotnik's evil scheme.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik invents an electron altering generator which makes Scratch and Grounder twice as fast as Sonic. When they lose it and Tails picks it up, Tails speeds through the Mobius countryside leaving disasters and accidents in his wake.
