programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: While out on a mischief-making mission to destroy the Smurfs' Happy Halloween party, Gargamel and Hogatha catch Lazy who has been accidentally turned red by Mother Nature. Papa and the Smurfs help Lazy escape while Mother Nature has Father Time help turn Lazy's red into blue just in time for the Halloween party.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Clumsy and Smurfette are captured by the wicked Bombast, who plans to exhibit them in his sideshow. Papa Smurf hurries to their rescue and using the bungling Gargamel for interference is able to rescue his Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: There is an evil power in the Titan's crown that Miner Smurf finds underground. And Greedy Smurf is the Smurf to fall victim to it. Then Gargamel comes up with some new schemes to destroy the Smurfs, and everything gets hopelessly tangled.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Jokey's surprise exploding packages have been changed by a spell. Picture the practical joker's discombobulating when he realises that all the surprises that he hands to unsuspecting Smurfs contain nothing but real gifts! No more ka-boom, no more jokes, no more fun! Plus the unenviable new position of Most Popular Smurf in the Village, surrounded by admirers begging for more presents...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf's had enough. The Smurflings and Sassette keep on telling tales about him with unpleasant results. He therefore concocts a magic formula, taken from Papa Smurf's books of spells, which makes the little Smurfs' tails grow longer and longer every time they tell tales. What he hasn't counted on is that Gargamel now has a way of catching the Smurflings.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs help a fairy queen outwit the evil fairy Fallon who tries to take away her son's magic rattle.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when Brainy and Baby mix up Papa Smurf's formulas, leaving them powerless before an army of hungry locusts unleashed on the forest by Gargamel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In the distant valley of Nodrog, the Smurfs meet the Molians who try to dissuade them from obtaining the magical Smurf-stone that Papa Smurf needs to cure his gout.

programme.title: Monster Smurfs
programme.desc: This is spook-a-Smurf eve, and all the Smurfs get ready for the fancy dress party… But Brainy Smurf gets hold of Papa Smurf's Book of Magic, and all the Smurfs are changed into hideous but funny creatures. Yet danger lurks...

programme.title: Hefty And The Wheelsmurfer
programme.desc: Hefty Smurf learns what is to be handicapped when he breaks his leg. Handy Smurf creates the wheelsmurfer for him, a contraption that will give Hefty some mobility. But suddenly the evil wizard Gargamel appears on the scene.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Poet Smurf's new play is going to be his greatest work ever, and it will feature the most favourite Smurf of all: Smurfette in the leading female role. All the other Smurfs vie for the honour of playing opposite Smurfette. Even Timid Smurf, who is the shy and retiring type, is a candidate for the part. Brainy Smurf, self-appointed manager of the play, does not see it that way...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs take Grandpa Smurf to the King's castle so that he can meet Peewit. But what with one thing and another (especially another), the Smurfs and Peewit are taken aboard a Viking long ship. The Vikings take Peewit to be their mythical Great Warrior, the one who is going to vanquish the Storm King. Can the Smurfs help Peewit out of his quandary?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: Smurf A Mile In My Shoes
programme.desc: The Smurfs band together to retrieve a sea-shell they need to release a hermit imp from the Sea Witch, as she cursed him with ugliness and a language very few understand. The Smurfs return with the sea-shell in time to break the curse and return the hermit to the handsome imp he once was.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Once in a blue moon, as the legend goes, a baby Smurf is delivered to the Smurfs and everyone in the village becomes attached to the new arrival. But a mistake has been made and the stork returns to take the baby back. Grouchy and Smurfette have become so attached to the baby that the baby is returned.

programme.title: Clumsy Luck
programme.desc: The Smurfs learn about superstition when Clumsy breaks Vanity's mirror prior to a meteor shower. When a meteor falls on Clumsy's house, everyone attributes it to bad luck, but realize the foolishness of this philosophy when they see Clumsy was not in the house at the time.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Oh dear! Sassette has lost a tooth. Papa Smurf explains that if she puts her tooth under her pillow, the Mouse Fairy will bring her a present in the morning. But the next morning there is no present under the pillow. The Mouse Fairy has not been. She has been captured in one of Gargamel’s Smurf traps. And now the evil wizard is concocting a dreadful plan.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Everybody can make a mistake. Take Papa Smurf, for instance. His new perfume-enhancing spray makes a rose smell like a thousand roses...but due to a whole series of misadventures it also makes all the Smurfs cry, moved to tears by the slightest of pretexts. While they sob, bawl, wail moan and whimper, the evil wizard Gargamel does not stand still...

programme.title: The Great Lime Crop Failure
programme.desc: Bullrush the Wartmonger is in a panic because the lime harvest has failed. So he captures Farmer Smurf, the world’s greatest agricultural expert, to solve his problems. Farmer Smurf installs an irrigation system and saves the harvest. He then escapes in a bubble and returns to the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: It's not every day you meet a talking flower. Especially not a character like Petaluma, a somewhat haughty bulb flower who Smurfette meets in the forest. Of course the delighted Smurfette takes Petaluma to the Village of the Smurfs... and starts a process that is going to endanger all of the Smurfs. Flowers, it seems, ought to be seen and not heard.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs learn that the mind is more powerful than matter when they are fooled by a quack's outrageously expensive miracle tonic. But Papa Smurf cures the Smurfs of their temporary naiveté and the charlatan of his villainy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Handy learns it’s better to have smurfed than not to have smurfed at all when he learns his true love is really a mermaid. Can they really live with each other forever?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When Brainy loses his glasses, he drops things, runs into objects, and becomes just as helpless as Clumsy, who now has to read to Brainy and help him get around. This experience makes Brainy feel guilty for the way he always made fun of Clumsy. He treats him with more respect once he receives a new pair of glasses.

programme.title: Papa's Day Off
programme.desc: The Smurfs decide Papa needs a rest, so they agree to work out their problems without him. Papa feels obsolete but his wise friend, Homnibus, shows how the Smurfs couldn't get along without him. When Papa returns in time to fix a leaking dam, he feels useful again.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Papa Smurf gives Weakling a special cream to wear that will restore his strength. Shortly after, he is awarded for his daring deeds of strength and his confidence really soars when he realizes the cream is smurfberry jam.

programme.title: Bringing Up Bigfeet
programme.desc: Remember Bigmouth, the ogre, and his lovely wife Bignose? They have a baby now: tiny (by ogre standards) Bigfeet. As the Smurflings Snappy, Slouchy and Nat, and of course the ever-willing Sassette are not entitled to baby-sit Baby Smurf, they volunteer to watch over Bigfeet, while its parents are at the Ogre Ball. The little Smurfs will get more than what they expected...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: The Smurf Who Would Be King
programme.desc: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs discover the spirit and joy of friendly competition when they hold their first "Smurfic Games". After a near miss with the troublesome cat Azrael, the Smurfs decide they need to get into better shape. Papa Smurf suggests that the Smurfs tone their bodies as well as sharpen their athletic abilities by inaugurating the "Smurfic Games".

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: It must be a coincidence: just as an elephant crosses the forest and meets baby Smurf, the Smurfs decide to create a big Smurf Circus. They are going to meet the infernal sorcerer Balthazar and Baby Smurf will have a lot of fun...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Snappy and Nat steal Gargamel's formula to make another Smurf – a female to be a companion to Smurfette. They create Sassette, who causes mischief wherever she goes. Papa uses his Smurfiness Solution to turn Gargamel's evil Sassette into a playful Smurfy Sassette.

programme.title: Mud-Wrestling Smurfs
programme.desc: The Wartmongers are draining Smurf River to make mud for their wrestling matches. Clumsy, who has been feeling like a loser at sports, becomes a hero when he must wrestle the Mad Maher as a distraction, enabling Papa and Hefty to break into the factory and destroy the mud making machine.

programme.title: The Bignose Dilemma
programme.desc: Vanity dislikes having the same blue nose as any other Smurf. What he needs is something special... Bignose, Bigmouth's fiancée, also wants to change her nose. And so, by the way, does Gargamel. Some nose exchanging takes place...

programme.title: The Colour Smurf
programme.desc: Spectra is the Colour Fairy, the one whose wheel of colours make all the blues, reds, yellows and greens of the world. She is a friend of Painter Smurf, so when he takes the Smurflings to her home in her absence, the Smurflings fool around with the Colour Wheel... and all the colours disappear from the Earth. What's worse, without colours the Colour Fairy cannot live...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In the distant valley of Nodrog, the Smurfs meet the Molians who try to dissuade them from obtaining the magical Smurf-stone that Papa Smurf needs to cure his gout.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: We all know Grouchy Smurf hates a lot of things. But one thing he hates more than anything else is water, when there is enough of it to drown in. You see, Grouchy can't swim. And when the Smurfs notice this peculiarity and try to teach him how to survive in water, the evil wizard Gargamel makes things a little more dangerous than they ought to be....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Scaredy Smurf runs into the Village screaming about the sky being about to smurf down. And just at the same moment, Papa Smurf is beset by uncontrollable fits of sneezing...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel infects Hefty's heart with hate and then uses the little Smurf as a decoy for the others. Fortunately, Hefty's love overcomes his hate and he helps his little friends escape from Gargamel's clutches.

programme.title: Jokey's Joke Book
programme.desc: Jokey Smurf's joke boxes are no longer funny to the other Smurfs. Jokey finds new ideas in his Great Joke Book, but these ideas are even less popular in the Village. And here comes the evil Gargamel with a few jokes of his own...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Handy learns it’s better to have smurfed than not to have smurfed at all when he learns his true love is really a mermaid. Can they really live with each other forever?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In another Smurf theatrical super-production based – very loosely – on Alexandre Dumas' characters, a masterpiece of the stage is created, with a few lines from Romeo and Juliet thrown in.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: No one believes Grandpa Smurf when he tells of far-away jungles and savannahs teeming with wild giant cats, striped horses, long-necked leaf-eaters and strange tribes... Only some Smurflings give some credit to his tales. But when Grandpa Smurf hears the sound of the magic Royal Drum in the forest, the one that can tame wild beasts, he sets out to prove that he's not an old addle-brained storyteller.

programme.title: Spelunking Smurfs
programme.desc: The starving Smurfs discover a cave that has a stash of frozen food inside guarded by an equally frozen troll who was imprisoned because of his greed by a magic diamond. As the Smurfs defrost the cave, Gargamel steals the food, but the magic diamond transforms him into an icy mass and the freed troll happily helps the Smurfs carry the food back to their village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Brainy makes an enlarging potion that turns Hefty into human size. The big-little strong man captures Gargamel and brings him back to the Smurf Village where Papa Smurf magically causes Azrael to chase his master back to his dreary castle.

programme.title: The Smurfomatic Smurfolator
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel still wants to destroy the Smurfs. This time, he sends on the forest the seeds of a creeping weed that is sure to entangle all the Smurfs… But Handy Smurf has devised a smurfomatic smurfolator...

programme.title: The Kaplowey Scroll
programme.desc: There is a terrifying magic word. When you direct the word at something or someone, you make it vanish into nothingness! Can the Smurfs undo its evil power before Gargamel gets hold of it?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf's had enough. The Smurflings and Sassette keep on telling tales about him with unpleasant results. He therefore concocts a magic formula, taken from Papa Smurf's books of spells, which makes the little Smurfs' tails grow longer and longer every time they tell tales. What he hasn't counted on is that Gargamel now has a way of catching the Smurflings.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Clumsy Smurf's misadventures take him across a river into Pussywillow Hollow. There he meets the Pixies – charming and shapely beings whose enemies, the Wartmongers, will meet the Smurfs in some unforeseen ways.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Every time Lazy falls asleep, he is caught in the same recurrent nightmare: he is in the power of Morphio, an evil sorcerer who wants to capture as many sleeping souls as possible. One after another, all the Smurfs are going to fall in Morphio's clutches. All of them? Well, maybe not, if Papa Smurf can help it. And Papa Smurf goes to the Sandman for help...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs discover a fountain of youth that is guarded by a wicked troll, who steals Papa Smurf's magic book. They convince Gargamel to help them and the greedy villain runs to get the water, but manages to fall in with the troll. As the two chase each other all over the countryside, the Smurfs are able to retrieve Papa Smurf's book.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Homnibus gives the Smurfs a dog that they name Puppy. The playful, normal-sized animal likes his new home, but Balthazar captures him, thinking that the Smurfs' magical secrets are in Puppy's collar. The Smurfs rescue the dog and Baby finds only music in the collar's locket.

programme.title: Reckless Smurfs
programme.desc: This time, Gargamel's plan cannot fail. Undeterred by Azrael's derisive cackling, the evil wizard perfects a magic substance called Daredevil Dust, which is going to change all the Smurfs into rash, incautious swashbucklers. Will Papa Smurf fall into Gargamel's trap? Will their enemy catch all the Smurfs? Will this story have a happy ending?

programme.title: Monster Smurfs
programme.desc: This is spook-a-Smurf eve, and all the Smurfs get ready for the fancy dress party… But Brainy Smurf gets hold of Papa Smurf's Book of Magic, and all the Smurfs are changed into hideous but funny creatures. Yet danger lurks...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: Now You Smurf 'Em, Now You Don't
programme.desc: The underground trolls who want them to be their slaves capture the Smurfs. Papa Smurf ingeniously frees them and then destroys the trolls' magic crystal ball that gives them power over the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs discover the spirit and joy of friendly competition when they hold their first "Smurfic Games". After a near miss with the troublesome cat Azrael, the Smurfs decide they need to get into better shape. Papa Smurf suggests that the Smurfs tone their bodies as well as sharpen their athletic abilities by inaugurating the "Smurfic Games".

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the emergency call rings, all the Smurfs in the Village drop what they are doing and run to hear the news. But when Vanity Smurf calls for an assembly so that the Smurfs can admire his new hat, it is too much. They send him on his way out of the village, and Vanity has the bad luck of meeting Lofty, the Elf, who suggests a horrible mud bath...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The wicked wizard Gargamel asks the sorcerer Balthazar for a recipe to capture the Smurfs. It involves kidnapping Mother Nature to stop the arrival of Spring. Luckily, the Smurfs save the day.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Poet Smurf's new play is going to be his greatest work ever, and it will feature the most favourite Smurf of all: Smurfette in the leading female role. All the other Smurfs vie for the honour of playing opposite Smurfette. Even Timid Smurf, who is the shy and retiring type, is a candidate for the part. Brainy Smurf, self-appointed manager of the play, does not see it that way...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Trying a new spell on the Smurfs backfires when Gargamel turns himself into stone. The Smurfs are delirious with joy. Their archenemy will make them suffer no more!

programme.title: The Horn Of Plenty
programme.desc: Mother Nature always does her best, but this time she's gone wrong. Her wand gets the wrong results and she accidentally damages the Autumn harvest. Now the Smurfs and all the forest animals face a lean and hungry winter. The only place where the Smurfs could get food would be the Land of Plenty. But Gargamel steals the famed Horn of Plenty to lure the Smurfs.

programme.title: Spelunking Smurfs
programme.desc: The starving Smurfs discover a cave that has a stash of frozen food inside guarded by an equally frozen troll who was imprisoned because of his greed by a magic diamond. As the Smurfs defrost the cave, Gargamel steals the food, but the magic diamond transforms him into an icy mass and the freed troll happily helps the Smurfs carry the food back to their village.

programme.title: Smurfette's Sweet Tooth
programme.desc: Once a year, Greedy Smurf makes a special batch of Smurfberry candy. Every Smurf receives a whole year's provision of the smurfiest candy in the whole world. But can a Smurf keep his provision for a whole year? Can the Smurfette?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf's had enough. The Smurflings and Sassette keep on telling tales about him with unpleasant results. He therefore concocts a magic formula, taken from Papa Smurf's books of spells, which makes the little Smurfs' tails grow longer and longer every time they tell tales. What he hasn't counted on is that Gargamel now has a way of catching the Smurflings.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Growing, harvesting and preparing food takes up much of the Smurfs' time. Handy invents a machine that farms and processes food. But this wonderful invention has its drawbacks...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Papa Smurf has been elected Wizard of the Year, and the evil wizard Gargamel is beside himself with jealousy. He will see to it that Papa's powers all disappear. And then, he is sure to catch all the Smurfs and celebrate with a big feast... But now, would Papa Smurf let such a bad thing happen? Surely not, Papa finds a way to foil Gargamel's plan...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel once again meets Esmeralda, the gypsy fortune-teller, and she finds a novel way of getting the gold coin that Gargamel imprudently shows her. But the Smurfs in their turn are tricked into believing there is such a thing as a good-luck tree...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Greenpeedeepee Swamp is the only place you can find Swamp Root, the delicious and necessary ingredient of Greedy Smurf’s famed swamp root stew. Unfortunately, it is also one place where you can find those hideous Wartmongers. Even though Sassette and the Smurfs save a young Wartmonger’s life, they still end up being captured by the others. But the Scarlet Croaker will save them! Maybe.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Papa's note to the Smurfs about viewing a comet is delivered torn. The Smurfs read only the first part and think their world is coming to an end. They plan how to spend their last day until Papa returns to clear up the misunderstanding and assure them that they are safe.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Smurfette promises Mother Nature that if she creates a blue rose Smurfette will never cut it. But when the white rose becomes blue, Smurfette becomes white. The only way to make Smurfette blue again is for her to cut the rose. She reluctantly cuts the rose, returning nature to normalcy and learning that one cannot always keep a promise.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Scaredy Smurf runs into the Village screaming about the sky being about to smurf down. And just at the same moment, Papa Smurf is beset by uncontrollable fits of sneezing...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel wants to create a monster. A horrible, gigantic creature, an awesome being that is going to destroy all the Smurfs! But Gargamel makes a slight mistake, and the result is going to astonish him and his cat Azrael.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Sweepy the chimney sweep Smurf is not the most popular inhabitant of the Village of the Smurfs. He is rather messy, and the clouds of soot that he makes certainly don't add to his popularity. Only the Smurflings find him great company as he's the only one who can get dirty and not be told off. Yet in their enthusiasm for Sweepy, the Smurflings endanger the Village.

programme.title: How To Smurf A Rainbow
programme.desc: Mother Nature is too busy to conjure a rainbow for the Smurfs' festival, so Papa Smurf borrows her cookbook and mixes up the recipe himself. As there is no yellow available, they use the leprechaun's gold to produce a beautiful rainbow before Gargamel can steal it.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hogatha disguises herself as the Golden Smurf Award to catch the Smurfs in order to use them as the main ingredient in her beauty cream. Vanity convinces her to try his recipe and before long, the wicked sorceress is covered with mud and sent careening over the hills into Gargamel's house.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A fierce wind carries the Smurfs' windmill away, with several Smurfs inside. Is Lazy Smurf really at fault or is an injustice being committed? Are the captive Smurfs going to be saved from the volcano's crater? Is Brainy going to smurf up his mouth for a moment?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Clumsy and Smurfette are captured by the wicked Bombast, who plans to exhibit them in his sideshow. Papa Smurf hurries to their rescue and using the bungling Gargamel for interference is able to rescue his Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel has found a new diabolical scheme to get rid of the Smurfs: a glittering powder that is going to reduce them to helpless laughter...

programme.title: The Littlest Witch
programme.desc: On an errand to Witch Haven for Papa Smurf, the little blue creatures meet a tiny witch and teach her how to be good while at the same time cause another witch to lose her wicked powers for one year after she falls into the river.

programme.title: The Trojan Smurf
programme.desc: Gargamel, the evil wizard, has devised a new plan to capture the Smurfs: he builds a giant statue in the shape of Papa Smurf. Thus, he hopes, the Smurfs are going to drag the statue into their Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel conjures a spell that makes Puppy think he's a cat. Papa receives a prescription from Homnibus to reverse the spell and all the Smurfs help. As Puppy becomes a dog again, Gargamel gets too close and he becomes a cat.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Yes, there can be too much of a good thing. When an accident happens to Papa Smurf's magic formula and he ends up multiplied by two, the Smurfs are elated: two Papa Smurfs can give twice the good counsel and twice the loving that one can. But after a while, things get too complex in the Village. Especially when another accident doubles the number of Gargamels!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Por pura casualidad, un elefante que pasaba por el bosque se encuentra con Bebé Pitufo, y los Pitufos deciden crear un gran Circo. Van a visitar al hechicero infernal Baltazar y Bebé Pitufo se lo está pasando genial…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Práctico aprende que es mejor haber pitufado que no haber pitufado nunca cuando descubre que su amor verdadero es una sirena. ¿Podrán vivir juntos para siempre?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Genio inventa a Pituforobotín para que ayude a todos los Pitufos en sus labores, pero Filósofo lo reprograma para que abandone la Aldea Pitufo.

programme.title: El Bebé Pitufo
programme.desc: Gargamel se transforma en un Bebé Pitufo, para ser adoptado por los Pitufos. Causa un completo caos en la Aldea de los Pitufos cuando intenta hacerlos volar por los aires con una bomba. Papá Pitufo descubre su malvado plan y utiliza el explosivo para enviar al mago de vuelta a su deprimente castillo.

programme.title: Armonía La Estrella De La Función
programme.desc: Pitufo Armonía firma inconscientemente un contrato con Escritor Fantasma para escribir una sinfonía, lo que hace que quede atrapado en un club nocturno fantasmal para siempre. Papá Pitufo exige un juicio con un jurado y un juez de fantasmas, que declaran inocente a Pitufo Armonía y culpable de plagio a Escritor Fantasma.

programme.title: Lenguaje De Señas
programme.desc: Los Pitufos conocen a un elfo del bosque, que les enseña la lengua de signos después de que Gargamel les administre una poción de enmudecimiento.

programme.title: El Genio De Granjero
programme.desc: Pitufo Labrador se pregunta qué hace una calabaza en el melonar, cuando debería estar junto a los colinabos. Cuando Pitufo Labrador tira de la calabaza y la separa del suelo, libera a un genio que comienza a llamarle amo e insiste en concederle deseos. El ansia del genio, llamado Gourdy, por complacer a Pitufo Labrador hará que, más que en una ayuda, se convierta en una molestia.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: Goloso Y La Olla De Estofado
programme.desc: El hada buena Guinilda entrega a Pitufo Goloso una olla mágica, pero Pitufo Filósofo hace que se desborde e inunde la aldea y el bosque. La bienintencionada hada acude al rescate y pide que le devuelvan la olla para dársela a un orfanato de niños hambrientos.

programme.title: ¿Cómo Hacer Un Arcoíris?
programme.desc: La madre naturaleza está demasiado ocupada para evocar un Arcoíris para el Festival de los Pitufos, así que Papá Pitufo pide prestado su libro de cocina para realizar la mezcla él mismo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos Monstruosos
programme.desc: Es la noche de los fantasmas y todos los Pitufos se preparan para la elegante fiesta de disfraces… pero Pitufo Filósofo se hace con el libro de magia de Papá Pitufo y todos los Pitufos se transforman en criaturas horrendas, aunque divertidas. No obstante, el peligro acecha…

programme.title: Los Amigos De Soñador
programme.desc: Cuando Pitufo Soñador decide visitar a sus amigos, los Tufos, Papá Pitufo crea una poción para transformar a los Pitufos en criaturas de aspecto alienígena. Sin embargo, los efectos de la poción desaparecen demasiado pronto y Pitufo Soñador tiene que enfrentarse a la realidad de que los Tufos no existen. Está triste hasta que llega un alienígena de verdad para devolver a Pitufo Soñador su carta, ya que la recibió por error.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando el hada de las flores aparece en el pueblo de los Pitufos, todos se enamoran de su encanto e inteligencia. Y pronto se darán cuenta de que se convertirá en una especie de mamá pitufo para todos…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La nota que Papá Pitufo escribió avisando a los demás Pitufos para que vean un cometa está rota. Al ser sólo capaces de leer una parte, los Pitufos creen que es el fin del mundo. Todos planean cómo será su último día, hasta que papá Pitufo regresa y clarifica el lío.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Hay algún tipo de poder maligno en la corona del Titan que Minero encuentra bajo tierra, y Avaricioso acaba sucumbiendo a él. Cuando Gargamel aparece con una de sus fechorías en mente, todo se acaba enrevesándose.

programme.title: Ya No Tengo Miedo
programme.desc: Una vez más, el infalible plan de Gargamel para atrapar a los Pitufos ha fracasado. Los Pitufos aprovechan para gastarle una broma: disfrazados de pequeños ángeles azules, le enseñarán a enmendar su conducta…

programme.title: El Castillo De Las Disputas
programme.desc: En el Castillo de las Disputas casi nunca se escuchan palabras amables. El brujo Selwyn y su pareja, la bruja Tallulah, se pasan el tiempo discutiendo. Tharp, la gárgola que tienen como mascota, se refugia en la Aldea Pitufa. Pero algo terrible va a suceder…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Si hay algo que la malvada hechicera Clorhidris no puede soportar es la felicidad de las demás personas. Contemplar la vida de los Pitufos, llena de amabilidad y canciones, pone furiosa a Clorhidris. Debe destruir esas risas y ahogar esas felices conversaciones… Entonces, planta la raíz del mal en el bosque y, poco después, todos los Pitufos dejan de hablarse. El único que no se ha visto afectado es Bebé Pitufo…

programme.title: El Pitufo De Troya
programme.desc: Gargamel, el malvado mago, ha ideado un nuevo plan para capturar a los Pitufos: ha construido una estatua gigante con la forma de Papá Pitufo. Espera que, al verla, los Pitufos lleven la estatua a su aldea.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Genio inventa una máquina que hará todo el trabajo de cosechar y preparar la comido de los Pitufos. Pero esta milagrosa invención tiene sus bemoles.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado hechicero Gargamel acude una vez más a Esmeralda, la adivinadora, la cual se las ingenia para hacerse con el dinero de Gargamel. Cuando es el turno de los Pitufos, les hace creer que existe un árbol de la suerte…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Genio ha decidido dedicarse al bienestar de los demás Pitufos. Va a curarles de todos sus males…con la ayuda del malvado Gargamel!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos llevan a Abuelo Pitufo al castillo del rey para que pueda conocer a Guillermo. Pero, entre una cosa y otra (sobre todo otra), los Pitufos y Guillermo acaban a bordo de una gran nave vikinga. Los vikingos creen que Guillermo es su mítico gran guerrero, aquel que derrotará al Rey Tormenta. ¿Podrán los Pitufos ayudar a Guillermo a salir de este embrollo?

programme.title: Ahora Los Pitufeas Y Ahora No
programme.desc: Los troles subterráneos capturan a los Pitufos para que sean sus esclavos. Papá Pitufo ingeniosamente los libera y luego destruye la bola de cristal mágica que les concede el poder sobre los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Para demostrar lo válido que es su «Gran libro de supervivencia en la naturaleza», Pitufo Filósofo se lleva a los Pitufitos al pantano. Allí, gracias a su experto consejo, el pequeño grupo se extravía, queda atrapado en arenas movedizas y es capturado por el Rey Verrugoso. Afortunadamente, el Rey Verrugoso está con ganas de jugar y decide hacer una caza del Pitufo. Desafortunadamente, Pitufo Filósofo cree que es un líder por naturaleza…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Gargamel y Baltasar se ponen a los mandos de un Robotín gigante para obligar al rey Gerard a que les entregue a Pitufo Robotín. Cuando el Robotín está a punto de destruir el castillo, Gigantón, el nuevo, enorme y extraño amigo de Pitufo Robotín, vence al Robotín. Pitufo Robotín sufre daños durante la batalla, pero Pitufo Carpintero lo arregla y le implanta una caja de voz que le permite decir «¡Hola!».

programme.title: Poema Al Tiempo
programme.desc: Pitufo Carpintero, Pitufo Filósofo, Pitufo Torpe y Pitufina descubren el reloj de arena del tiempo en una cueva y empiezan a trastear con él, lo que provoca que el tiempo se descontrole para todos los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: El Bueno El Malo Y El Pitufo
programme.desc: Un malvado brujo captura a los Pitufos para usarlos en su plan para robar todo el oro del Rey Argón.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos descubren el espíritu deportivo, la alegría y la amista cuando llevan a cabo sus primeros "Juegos Pitufos". Los Pitufos deciden ponerse en forma tras casi perder contra el gato Azrael.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Primera Navidad De Bebe Pitufo
programme.desc: La ilusión de Navidad se ve frustrada cuando Chlorhydris hechiza a San Nicolás para que no pueda repartir felicidad en Navidad. Afortunadamente, Papá Pitufo y los demás pitufos consiguen romper el hechizo y devolver la Navidad a su bosque.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Papá Pitufo le da a Pitufo Debilucho una crema especial para que la utilice y recupere su fuerza. Poco después, recibe una condecoración por sus heroicos actos de fortaleza, y su autoestima se dispara cuando se da cuenta de que la crema es simplemente mermelada de pitufrutas.

programme.title: El Pitufo Reportero
programme.desc: Pitufo Curioso ha tenido una idea: ¿por qué no imprimir un boletín con todas las noticias de la aldea? Está seguro de que sus cotilleos sobre los Pitufos interesarán a todos los lectores. Pero las cosas no salen exactamente según lo previsto cuando Papá Pitufo encuentra superpitufrutas.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cada mañana, los duendecillos del agua depositan rocío sobre las hojas del bosque. No imaginas todo lo que ocurrirá cuando Pitufo Miedoso se transforme con la varita mágica que crea las gotas de rocío…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Armonía ya no es bienvenido en el coro de los Pitufos: canta de una manera demasiado desafinada. Sin embargo, Papá Pitufo le entrega un amuleto que le convertirá en un virtuoso del canto. Y, por si fuera poco, aquí llega Hogata…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos hambrientos descubren una cueva en donde se encuentra oculta comida congelada custodiada por un trol también congelado quien fue encarcelado debido a su avaricia por un diamante mágico. Mientras los Pitufos descongelan la cueva Gargamel roba la comida, pero el diamante mágico lo transforma en una masa helada y el trol liberado ayuda gustosamente a los Pitufos a cargar la comida de regreso a su aldea.

programme.title: Ya No Tengo Miedo
programme.desc: Una vez más, el infalible plan de Gargamel para atrapar a los Pitufos ha fracasado. Los Pitufos aprovechan para gastarle una broma: disfrazados de pequeños ángeles azules, le enseñarán a enmendar su conducta…

programme.title: El Capricho De Travieso
programme.desc: ¿Sabías que, si atrapas un trol, este puede concederte un deseo? Resulta que Aloysius el trol ha quedado atrapado en una de las pitufitrampas de Gargamel. Pitufo Colérico le libera y, como recompensa, consigue que los demás Pitufos satisfagan todos sus caprichos. Esto acarrea un montón de problemas para los Pitufos, ya que los Pitufitos, en ocasiones, piden cosas que no son buenas para ellos… ni tampoco para los demás.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Miedoso entra corriendo en la aldea y grita que el cielo se está cayendo. Justo en ese mismo momento, Papá Pitufo está aquejado de un incontrolable ataque de estornudos…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos descubren una Fuente de la Juventud cuidada por un espantoso Troll que roba el libro mágico de Papá Pitufo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Práctico aprende que es mejor haber pitufado que no haber pitufado nunca cuando descubre que su amor verdadero es una sirena. ¿Podrán vivir juntos para siempre?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Poeta y Pintor se sienten poco valorados y huyen a una isla tormentosa sin saber que Gargamel los sigue hasta allí.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El Día de los Inocentes Pitufo resulta no ser tan divertido cuando Gargamel se pone un disfraz de Pitufoarbusto para capturar al pequeño Pitufo Feliz. Papá Pitufo pide ayuda a Pitufopluma para que llame a los pájaros y ataquen al falso arbusto.

programme.title: El Amo Escrúpulo
programme.desc: Pitufo Labrador es el reticente amo de un genio llamado Gourdy, cuyo entusiasmo por ser servicial es quizá algo excesivo. Tras un nuevo incidente provocado por el exceso de celo de Gourdy, Pitufo Labrador le dice algo que no debería haber dicho y Gourdy desaparece. ¿Y a que no adivinas quién lo encuentra? En efecto: Escrupuloso, el aprendiz del malvado mago Gargamel. ¿Y quién podría arrebatar a Gourdy de las manos de Escrupuloso, sino el propio Gargamel?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado mago Gargamel ha conseguido unos huevos mágicos de cristal citoplásmico que le permitirán intercambiar su cuerpo con el de Papá Pitufo. ¿Qué otro plan mejor que ese podría haber? Una vez que esté en el cuerpo de Papá Pitufo, llevará a todos los Pitufos hasta su caldero. Pero, por juegos del destino, Gargamel se transforma en Perro, el perro de los Pitufos…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El Pitufo Carpintero se encuentra con una anciana trol en el bosque, que le suplica que le ayude a librarse de un grano rojo que tiene en la nariz… ¡dándole un buen puntapié! Pitufo Carpintero la ayuda sin mucho convencimiento. Y el resultado resulta sorprendente para él.

programme.title: Pitufan Nuestra Canción
programme.desc: Gargamel lanza un hechizo a la flauta mágica de Woody para que la música que salga de ella pase de ser buena a ser mala. Gargamel captura a los Pitufos, pero Sasita les salva diciéndole a Gargamel que le ama. Este toca la flauta, pero la música se desvanece a medida que Gargamel se ve inundado de sentimientos de amor, y termina por liberar a los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Tontín y Pitufina son capturados para ser exhibidos en una Feria. Papá Pitufo aprovecha la torpeza de Gargamel para rescatarlos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Natural y Travieso roban la fórmula de Gargamel para hacer otro Pitufo - otra pitufa para acompañar a Pitufina. Así pues, crean a Sassette, que crea problemas por doquier. Haciendo uso de su poción, Papá Pitufo convierte la malvada creación de Gargamel en una simpática Sassette.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Otra estupenda producción del teatro de los Pitufos basada en los personajes de Alejandro Dumas. Incluye algunas líneas de Romeo y Julieta. Una obra maestra de la escena.

programme.title: La Fórmula Aniquiladora
programme.desc: Existe una palabra mágica aterradora. Cuando pronuncias esa palabra hacia algo o alguien, ¡haces que se desvanezca en la nada! ¿Podrán los Pitufos anular su malvado poder antes de que Gargamel se apropie de ella?

programme.title: El Pitufo De Troya
programme.desc: Gargamel, el malvado mago, ha ideado un nuevo plan para capturar a los Pitufos: ha construido una estatua gigante con la forma de Papá Pitufo. Espera que, al verla, los Pitufos lleven la estatua a su aldea.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Filósofo está harto. Los Pitufitos y Sasita siguen inventándose historias sobre él con desagradables consecuencias. Por eso, prepara una fórmula mágica, extraída del libro de hechizos de Papá Pitufo, que hace que los pequeños Pitufos crezcan y crezcan cada vez que dicen mentiras. Pero no había contado con que ahora Gargamel tiene una forma de capturar a los Pitufitos.

programme.title: La Brigada De Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando en la Aldea Pitufa forman una brigada de incendios para combatir las llamas que devoran la cocina de Pitufo Goloso, se dan cuenta de que Gargamel les ha dejado sin agua. Sin embargo, no se da cuenta de la fragilidad de su presa, que se rompe y provoca que el agua arrastre a Gargamel y Azrael e inunde la Aldea Pitufa, extinguiendo el fuego.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Las pinturas del malvado Maestro son capaces de tele portar a sus modelos dentro del cuadro…para siempre! Papá pitufo le dice a Pintor que cambie las pinturas y en poco tiempo Maestro acaba dentro de uno de sus cuadros, al lado de su modelo de ensueño: Pitufina.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos van al rescate de dos niños y su abuelo, cuando un misterioso extranjero aparece haciendo que su trineo se rompa en pedazos. Al llamar a la puerta de Gargamel en busca de ayuda, no se dan cuenta de que están poniendo en peligro sus vidas y la de los Pitufos...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Simón se ha perdido en el bosque buscando a sus padres, una pareja de gigantes. Los Pitufos tratarán de llevarlo de vuelta a su casa, pero gargamel aparecerá una vez más con no muy buenas intenciones.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Mejor Memoria De La Aldea
programme.desc: A consecuencia de un loco experimento, Pitufo Torpe puede ahora almacenar interminables conocimientos en su memoria. Gargamel lo captura e intenta que le revele la fórmula de invisibilidad de Papá Pitufo, pero, en el último segundo, Pitufo Torpe le engaña diciéndole unos ingredientes erróneos.

programme.title: Cosas Que Putifan En La Noche
programme.desc: Cuando Pitufo Colérico pierde a su oso de peluche Huggy, no consigue dormir a pesar de los esfuerzos de Papá Pitufo por convencerle de que los osos de peluche son mágicos y pueden cuidar de sí mismos. Gargamel se tropieza con la Aldea Pitufa y Huggy regresa convertido en un oso gigante para espantar y salvar a Pitufo Colérico.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Creyendo que Bebé Pitufo es un duende, dos cazadores furtivos lo secuestran e intentan que el pequeño les diga dónde ha escondido la olla de oro. Papá Pitufo organiza a todos para atacar a los villanos con tartas de pitufrutas y lograr que Bebé Pitufo pueda escapar.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Indeciso, tal como su nombre indica, no consigue decidirse sobre nada. Los otros Pitufos le llevan al bosque para hacer una prueba de supervivencia en la que únicamente pueda encontrar el camino de vuelta a casa tomando decisiones. Sin embargo, acaba en el castillo de Baltasar.

programme.title: Lenguaje De Señas
programme.desc: Los Pitufos conocen a un elfo del bosque, que les enseña la lengua de signos después de que Gargamel les administre una poción de enmudecimiento.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Un hechizo ha alterado las cajas sorpresa explosivas de Pitufo Bromista. Imagina la cara de desconcierto que se le queda a este guasón cuando se da cuenta de que todas las sorpresas que entrega a otros incautos Pitufos en realidad contienen regalos. ¡Se acabaron las explosiones, las bromas y la diversión! Y a eso se le une su poco envidiable posición como el Pitufo más popular de la aldea, rodeado de admiradores que no cesan de pedirle más obsequios…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Hogata consigue los pendientes dorados mágicos de Sonoria, que le permitirán oír las voces de los Pitufos desde lejos. Siguiendo los ronquidos de Pitufo Perezoso, está a punto de llegar hasta la Aldea Pitufa, pero entonces los sonidos del cuerno de Pitufo Armonía comienzan a resonar en sus pendientes y huye enfurecida de vuelta a casa.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cada mañana, los duendecillos del agua depositan rocío sobre las hojas del bosque. No imaginas todo lo que ocurrirá cuando Pitufo Miedoso se transforme con la varita mágica que crea las gotas de rocío…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Fortachón descubre a un caballero que lo ayuda a combatir a un Dragón, pero éste huye y deja a Fortachón defendiendo a los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos aman las trufas y las trufas son de los Trolls. No será nada fácil que los pitufitos azules tengan un banquete.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Genio inventa a Pituforobotín para que ayude a todos los Pitufos en sus labores, pero Filósofo lo reprograma para que abandone la Aldea Pitufo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos Monstruosos
programme.desc: Es la noche de los fantasmas y todos los Pitufos se preparan para la elegante fiesta de disfraces… pero Pitufo Filósofo se hace con el libro de magia de Papá Pitufo y todos los Pitufos se transforman en criaturas horrendas, aunque divertidas. No obstante, el peligro acecha…

programme.title: Una Campana Para Azrael
programme.desc: Gargamel lanza un hechizo a una campana atada a la cola de Azrael que conducirá al gato hasta los Pitufos. Pero Papá Pitufo es más astuto que él y lanza un contra hechizo que lleva al mago hasta Gigantón, en lugar de hasta los deliciosos Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: En el Día de la Infelicidad, los Pitufos tienen que ser infelices para poder apreciar su felicidad durante el resto del año. Gargamel inventa un detector de felicidad para encontrar a los Pitufos, pero lo usa justo el único día en el que los Pitufos no son felices. En su lugar, encuentra a una pareja de dragones felices y desata su ira.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos hambrientos descubren una cueva en donde se encuentra oculta comida congelada custodiada por un trol también congelado quien fue encarcelado debido a su avaricia por un diamante mágico. Mientras los Pitufos descongelan la cueva Gargamel roba la comida, pero el diamante mágico lo transforma en una masa helada y el trol liberado ayuda gustosamente a los Pitufos a cargar la comida de regreso a su aldea.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Todos sabemos que Pitufo Gruñón odia varias cosas. Pero la cosa que odia más que nada es el agua, cuando hay suficiente para que se pueda ahogar. Pitufo Gruñón no sabe nadar. Y cuando los Pitufos notan esto y le tratan de enseñar cómo sobrevivir en el agua, el malvado mago Gargamel hace que todo sea un poco más peligroso de lo que debería ser...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Epidemia De La Tos Saltarina
programme.desc: Gargamel propaga un extraño germen por el bosque que hace toser a todos sin parar. Bebé Pitufo es la primera víctima y todo el pueblo está muy preocupado…Afortunadamente, Papá Pitufo cree conocer la solución.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado primo del Rey, Malcolm, lo ha convertido en un ciervo negro para poder acabar con él y ponerle en su sala de trofeos. Los Pitufos irán a ayudar a su amigo y, tras devolver al Rey a su verdadera forma, Malcom acabará preso dentro del cuerpo del ciervo negro.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando el hada de las flores aparece en el pueblo de los Pitufos, todos se enamoran de su encanto e inteligencia. Y pronto se darán cuenta de que se convertirá en una especie de mamá pitufo para todos…

programme.title: El Regreso De Don Pitufo
programme.desc: Cuando una gota de la nueva poción de Papá Pitufo cae en el libro de aventuras de los Pitufitos, el héroe de ficción cobra vida. El intrépido Don Pitufo, que desea deshacer a los Pitufos del malvado Gargamel, lo captura con valentía…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La nueva obra de Pitufo Poeta va a ser su mayor creación de todos los tiempos, y contará con Pitufina, la preferida de todos, como actriz principal. Los demás Pitufos compiten por el honor de actuar junto a Pitufina. Incluso Pitufo Tímido, que es muy discreto y retraído, es uno de los candidatos al papel. Pero Pitufo Filósofo, que se ha autodesignado director de la obra, no lo ve de la misma manera…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado mago Gargamel vuelve a estar en problemas. Si no puede reunir una enorme cantidad de oro para el atardecer, le arrebatarán todas sus posesiones. Sin embargo, los Pitufos van a ayudar a su archienemigo… hasta cierto punto.

programme.title: Aquel Que Pitufa El Último…
programme.desc: Pitufo Bromista se pasa de la raya con sus bromas cuando Clorhidris cae víctima de una de ellas. Para vengarse de los Pitufos, crea un hechizo para robar su sentido del humor. Pitufo Gruñón, que ya de por sí no tenía sentido del humor, se hace con la poción de humor y rompe el hechizo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Es cierto: lo bueno en exceso puede ser malo. Cuando se produce un accidente que afecta a la fórmula mágica de Papá Pitufo y este acaba duplicado, los Pitufos se muestran encantados: dos Papás Pitufo pueden dar el doble de buenos consejos y el doble de amor que uno solo. Sin embargo, después de un tiempo, las cosas se complican en exceso en la aldea. ¡Sobre todo cuando otro accidente hace que Gargamel también se duplique!

programme.desc: Te traemos los momentos más divertidos jamás captados por la cámara.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Roblox DOORS with Thinknoodles!
programme.desc: Thinknoodles plays Roblox Doors horror game in ROBLOX!

programme.title: Super Mario RPG
programme.desc: Enter a world of whimsy with Mario on a quest to repair Star Road and defeat the troublemaking Smithy Gang, who has crashed into their world and scattered the 7 Star Pieces of Star Road. Abdallah plays as Mario and teams up with a party of unlikely allies, like the monstrous Bowser and a mysterious doll named Geno, in Super Mario RPG on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Sonic X
programme.desc: A slight malfunction causes Chaos Control, and sends Sonic the Hedgehog to Earth. While there, Sonic meets Chris Thorndyke, who helps in collecting the Chaos Emeralds, so Sonic and friends can go home.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros. Wonder
programme.desc: Mario and friends are invited to the Flower Kingdom by its ruler, Prince Florian, when Bowser suddenly appears, along with Kamek and Bowser Jr.! Bowser then takes hold of the Wonder Flower, merging himself, his Koopa Clown Car, and Prince Florian's castle to become a flying fortress, wreaking havoc across the land and trapping the Poplins in their homes. Abdallah plays as Mario and friends and sets off on a journey to defeat Bowser and save the Flower Kingdom in Super Mario Bros. Wonder on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Sonic Superstars
programme.desc: Adventure through the mystical Northstar Islands and harness all-new Emerald powers to move and attack in dynamic new ways. Navigate gorgeous, never-before-seen environments and stop Dr. Eggman, Fang, and a mysterious new adversary from converting the islands' giant animals into Badniks before it's too late! Watch as Abdallah plays as Sonic and friends in Sonic Superstars on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Princess Peach: Showtime!
programme.desc: Princess Peach sets off to save the Sparkle Theater from Grape and the Sour Bunch. The guardian fairy of the Sparkle Theater, Stella, assists Peach by giving her usage of Sparkle power and allowing her to transform. Abdallah plays as Princess Peach in Princess Peach: Showtime! on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.desc: Get ready to focus your creativity! On Sunday, June 29, celebrate National Camera Day with a picture-perfect marathon on CraftsyTV. programme.title: Beginners Guide To Manual Mode
programme.desc: Get ready to focus your creativity! On Sunday, June 29, celebrate National Camera Day with a picture-perfect marathon on CraftsyTV. programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Welcome to the second episode of the Holiday Gift-Along! Your hostess with the mostest (thread), Angela Walters, is back with another gift-worthy project idea: a basic quilted zipper bag with boxed corners. Don't worry, making zippers isn't as scary as you think!

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: In the final episode of the Holiday Gift-Along, your last-minute gift quilter, Angela Walters, is making a beginner-friendly criss cross quilt. This gift-able quilt project is much easier than it looks, so you still have time to make it before the holidays!

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.sub-title: Bonus: How to Pick Threads for Colorful Quilts
programme.desc: Stuck on which thread color to choose? You're not alone! This a common quilter's question, and Angela is here to give you some handy tips to pick thread colors for your quilts. Find out how to match thread colors to fabric so the quilting is nice and visible, while still blending in. Happy Quilting!

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: What do you get when you combine a rainbow quilt, a star quilt and a medallion quilt all into one? A fresh episode of "The Midnight Quilt Show," of course! Join Angela as she breaks down Y-seams, quilting with templates and beyond.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela is kicking off Season 7 of the Midnight Quilt Show with a redemption story. She’s made this Thistle quilt pattern before with half-square triangles but thinks this flying-geese version will be much easier to quilt.

programme.title: Baking & Cooking
programme.desc: Learn to bake and cook with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Craft Hacks
programme.desc: Time-saving quick tips to feed your crafting craving.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Sewing experts offer easy ways to create neat sewing projects right at home. Viewers of all skill levels learn tips and techniques for creating professional-looking garments, personalized apparel and home accents. Weekly episodes feature various themes, and feature two main projects and one shorter technique segment. Some projects include monogramming napkins and towels; baby poncho, hooded towel and baby-friendly diapers; embellishing yoga pants with a clothing tattoo; and sewing on knits.

programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Take it slow with this model railroad tour.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: These monsters just dropped in to say HAPPY BIRTHDAY!

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: No piping? No problem. Check out JJR's cake hacks to make a faux piped royal icing cake accented with a sugar poppy.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Get scandalous with naked cakes. JJR bares it all and makes a rustic naked cake with flowers & a pop of pink buttercream filling.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Guess what? You likely own everything needed to make this glamorous cake! Bust out those cutters and slay some metallic cakes with JJR.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Get scandalous with naked cakes. JJR bares it all and makes a rustic naked cake with flowers & a pop of pink buttercream filling.

programme.title: Butter Book
programme.desc: Learn to bake and cook with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Garden Party
programme.desc: Ready to dig in and grow your green thumb? Join us for a delightful hour of expert-led gardening tutorials designed to inspire and educate gardeners of all levels. From essential planting tips and soil secrets to creative container gardening and vibrant floral arrangements, our seasoned instructors will guide you through every step. Whether you're a seasoned horticulturist or just starting out, you'll find fresh ideas and practical techniques to cultivate the garden of your dreams.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Today we take a very personal approach using our names and monograms. Our first projects are monogram ornaments made from air dry clay. Then make initial letter necklaces for you and your friends. Today's art journal technique is lettering -- learn some tips for simple calligraphy. Finally make an initial bulletin board covered with initials and doodle art.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Travel to the future for new adventures. Jenny Barnett-Rohrs makes a metallic robot tray to hold coins and treasures. Then, she creates a mysterious sea creature. Franz Spohn launches aliens into outer space and Jenny makes futuristic sculptures from foam.

programme.title: Figure Drawing: An Essential Guide
programme.desc: Learn to draw and paint with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Vanilla & Beyond: Baking With Flavors First
programme.desc: Learn to bake with CraftsyTV

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Meet quilting expert Kimberly Einmo and preview the exclusive Night Stars quilt pattern you'll make in class. Before you start sewing, set yourself up for success with Kimberly's tips for pre-washing, pressing and cutting your fabrics. Plus, discover a timesaving trick for pre-cutting accurate border strips!

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: CAUTION: Baby quilts are a total gateway drug! Just ask Angela: she's working this cute little number up for her newborn nephew. (Think you can stop at one? Don't say we didn't warn you!)

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: This is not a drill! Angela has heard your requests loud and clear, and she's finally making the Bargello quilt that everyone's been asking for! So break out the layer cakes and prepare to get crazy with precuts.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: This week's quilt radiates piece and love. Angela uses color placement for a heart-shaped quilt that's easier to make than it looks. IMPORTANT NOTE: The "Piece & Love" quilt designed by Audrey Mann and Dianne Brinton is no longer included with the class.

programme.title: Craft Hacks
programme.desc: Time-saving quick tips to feed your crafting craving.

programme.desc: Joshua John Russell creates modern, edible masterpieces with cake, fondant and buttercream.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Sink your teeth into current cake decorating trends! In the Man About Cake series, Joshua John Russell delivers incredible tips for creating modern edible masterpieces. Each week, he decorates an original cake, shares his favorite recipes and gives pointers for designing like a pro.

programme.title: Anti-Valentine's Cake
programme.desc: JJR is celebrating Valentine's Day (a little) differently this year. If you're feeling anti-Valentine's yourself, get the recipes and everything you need to make this cake!

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: What to do with all that leftover garbage cake? Make these chocolate-dipped not-ice-cream-cone treats (a JJR original creation).

programme.title: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Whether it holds recipes, keepsakes, sewing tools, or anything else, this handmade box makes a perfect last minute gift for any occasion. George Vondriska shows you how to whip up your own handmade box in just a few simple steps.

programme.title: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: The simple wooden spatula is an essential cooking tool that adds a handmade touch to any kitchen. George Vondriska demonstrates how to make your own wooden spatula in a few easy steps. This easy project makes a great gift for any home chef.

programme.title: Fresh Quilting
programme.desc: Use shapes in new ways. Modern Quilt Guild marketing director Heather Grant discusses the modern quilt aesthetic and modern quilt designs. programme.title: Award-Winning Weddings
programme.desc: No long-winded boring speeches or cookie cutter vows here! The Best Speech Or Vows award goes to the video that showcases a speech or vow that leave us in awe. Speeches can be emotional, hilarious, sweet and tear-inducing. Personalized vows can show us everything about a couple in a few well thought out sentences. The words and sentiment of an amazing speech or spectacular vows will last long after the walk down the aisle is over and the last glasses have been clinked. This episode contains finalists from the 2024 Wedding Film Awards.

programme.title: Tentacle 8
programme.desc: A mysterious computer virus wipes out highly classified personnel files at the NSA, prompting a top secret investigation. Raymond Berry, an NSA operative suspected of crimes against the United States, risks his life to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Susie's Hope
programme.desc: Based on a true story, the inspirational relationship between Donna Lawrence (Emmanuelle Vaguer) a pit bull attack survivor, and Susie (Susie Lawrence), an abused pit bull-mix puppy, as they learn to heal and forgive together.

programme.title: Like Sunday, Like Rain
programme.desc: Surrounded by wealth and living with abundant resources in Manhattan, 12-year-old cello prodigy Reggie, lives a solitary life lacking only frequently absent parents and friends. Estranged from family, having slacker boyfriend troubles, and fired from her waitressing job, sometimes musician 23-year-old Eleanor needs a new place to live and a new job.

programme.title: Watercolor Postcards
programme.desc: A small town girl with a troubled past returns home only to find that both her sister and her hometown are in peril. Only when she falls for a man who similarly has dark days behind him will they muster up the faith and love needed to save the things they hold dear in life.

programme.title: Walt Before Mickey
programme.desc: A young man named Walt Disney had big dreams, and no matter how many obstacles he had to face he never gave up--from his tumultuous childhood, to serving his country, to borrowing money, to the creation of his first iconic animated character Mickey Mouse.

programme.title: Camp Cool Kids
programme.desc: At their summer camp competition games, Spence and his big brother Zach find themselves on opposing teams: its the dweebs against the bullies. Can Spence make new friends, overcome his fears and find faith in himself, stand up to the bullies and win a trophy in the process?

programme.desc: In this episode, we’ll talk with a group of nurses about their experiences dealing with increased workplace violence and harassment during the COVID-19 pandemic. We’ll also go over the effects of COVID-19 and irregular sleep patterns on depression in children and adults.

programme.title: HealthDay
programme.desc: In this episode, we’ll talk with the chair of last year’s American Heart Association Scientific Sessions on new diet guidelines and programs to combat health inequity. We’ll also share tips on improving your heart health and identifying potential symptoms of heart damage and disease.

programme.title: HealthDay
programme.desc: In this episode, we’ll talk with several experts on the often stigmatized topic of sexual intimacy among older adults. We’ll also share information on how seniors can slow the spread of Parkinson’s disease, deal with symptoms of menopause, and reduce their risk of Alzheimer’s.

programme.title: HealthDay
programme.desc: In this episode, we’ll cover common public health issues caused by smog, pollen, and other environmental hazards. We’ll also discuss how to avoid Lyme disease, West Nile virus, and sinusitis.

programme.title: HealthDay
programme.desc: In this episode, we’ll speak with experts on how the lack of accessibility to basic healthcare has affected people around the country, as well as what steps can be taken to ensure greater health equity.

programme.title: HealthDay
programme.desc: In this episode, we’ll talk with a former cancer patient who was treated with psilocybin about his experiences, as well as a psychiatry professor who has spent decades researching the effects of medical hallucinogens.

programme.title: HealthDay
programme.desc: In this episode, we’ll be discussing the dangers of drug abuse and addiction, speaking with doctors and survivors of opioid abuse on the factors behind the recent spike in addiction across the country.

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series
programme.desc: In today’s lesson we will use the crescent lunge to awaken the energy at the core of your being.

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series

programme.desc: For day 19 we will use side plank as the vehicle of awareness that might help us glimpse the truth of any given moment.

programme.title: Good Morning Joy
programme.desc: Celebrity hypnotist Tim Shurr helps you unlock happiness and shed anxiety. Shari tests her hypnotizability, and the story of a woman who took back her mental health by empowering women worldwide. Plus, live from Heartfulness headquarters in India.

programme.title: Good Morning Joy
programme.sub-title: Good Morning Joy - Triumph Over Trauma
programme.desc: 1963 Playboy Icon and Cosby Survivor, Victoria Valentino, shares her journey of overcoming unimaginable circumstances leading her to activism and purpose. Plus, one man's heroic efforts to save a tiny, unconscious life, and fun street interviews from NYC.

programme.title: The Aware Show
programme.sub-title: The Aware Show - Thriving in Later Years
programme.desc: Lisa Garr talks with retired therapist Connie Zweig, who says it’s possible to thrive as we age. She is an expert in the shadow self" & teaches aging as a spiritual practice. Her latest book is “The Inner Work of Age: Shifting from Role to Soul.”"

programme.title: The Aware Show
programme.sub-title: The Aware Show - Thriving in Later Years (Arielle Ford)
programme.desc: Lisa Garr talks with retired therapist Connie Zweig, who says it’s possible to thrive as we age. She is an expert in the shadow self" & teaches aging as a spiritual practice. Her latest book is “The Inner Work of Age: Shifting from Role to Soul.”

programme.title: The Aware Show
programme.desc: Lisa Garr talks with psychiatrist Dr. Paul Conti on the invisible epidemic which impacts us all on some level. He believes it’s trauma. A graduate of Stanford University & former chief resident at Harvard, he is a leading trauma treatment expert.

programme.title: The Aware Show
programme.sub-title: The Aware Show: Dr Jill Bolte Taylor - Whole Brain Living and Choice
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr Jill Bolte Taylor, a Harvard-trained and published neuroanatomist. She shares with us the idea of cellular circuitry and how there are four distinct modules of cells that make up who we are, combining the thinking mind and the emotional side. She discusses her new book, Whole Brain Living: The Anatomy of Choice and the Four Characteristics that Drive Our Life.

programme.title: The Aware Show
programme.sub-title: The Aware Show: Robert Thurman - Wisdom is Bliss
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Professor Robert Thurman, the preeminent scholar and interpreter of Tibetan Buddhist philosophy for the modern world, who believes that Wisdom is Bliss and in fact, that’s the name of his latest book. Thurman is a very close friend of HH Dalai Lama and today he discusses deep ideas about mindfulness and presence and leads us on a joyful exploration into the nature of reality through Buddha’s threefold curriculum.

programme.title: The Wright Turn
programme.sub-title: The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: La Dolce Vita (Sweet Life) - Ten years after the divorce from Maxwell Turner, with children grown, Celeste Wright Turner makes a choice to start living her life. No SEX with the EX! Simon and Mimi try to get Celeste’s head on straight when it comes to Maxwell’s charm. After facing an emotional challenge, Celeste decides to take a trip abroad.

programme.title: The Emerging Science of Longevity
programme.sub-title: The Emerging Science of Longevity: Optimizing Health with the Fundamentals
programme.desc: There are basic fundamental ways we can optimize our health, starting with topics we’ve already discussed, like eating well and exercising appropriately. But, just as important for health and longevity is the need to rest, relax, and connect with each other. Community is essential, and being of service to one another can help you heal.

programme.title: The Emerging Science of Longevity
programme.sub-title: The Emerging Science of Longevity: Adversity Mimetics to Activate Healing and Repair
programme.desc: Too much stress will take you down, but the right amount of stress at the right time can activate your body's repair and healing mechanisms. What natural elements stress our system in such a way that it then activates the body to heal?

programme.title: The Emerging Science of Longevity
programme.sub-title: The Emerging Science of Longevity: Abundance Mimetics to Activate Longevity Pathways
programme.desc: If you get a brand new Toyota Camry, you can probably drive it for ten years without much attention. But if you have a 1938 Mercedes-Benz, it takes more love and care to keep it running. As we age, we become like that classic car, needing extra love and care.

programme.title: The Emerging Science of Longevity
programme.sub-title: The Emerging Science of Longevity: Measuring Health & Aging
programme.desc: Are there biomarkers we can measure that determine our biological age and the state of our operating system? How do we start to measure DNA methylation? What about our telomeres? How do we measure protein changes, or all the various nutrient sensing pathways that have gone awry, and could we use precision medicine to get to longevity escape velocity — i.e. the extension of lifespan indefinitely?

programme.title: The Emerging Science of Longevity
programme.sub-title: The Emerging Science of Longevity: Optimizing Biology with Advanced Therapies
programme.desc: How can we optimize our biology beyond straightforward diet and lifestyle approaches? There are certain natural compounds, whether phytochemicals in plants or things your body creates (like stem cells) that hold promise as longevity therapies.

programme.title: The Emerging Science of Longevity
programme.sub-title: The Emerging Science of Longevity: When Trauma Becomes Pathology & The Future of Aging Research
programme.desc: There's a Hebrew prayer, a blessing, which says, May you live to be 120 years old. Pretty soon we'll need to change it to May you live to be 220 years old. To close this program, Dr. Hyman discusses innovative technologies that are helping us take advantage of the science of longevity.

programme.title: A Strong & Stable Spine
programme.desc: This class primarily focuses on increasing the flexibility and suppleness of your cervical spine (the top 7 vertebrae, otherwise known as your neck). We tend to neglect the neck when we practice/train. It has the tendency to be stiff and weak. So, before we practice some strength building mobility work in the next class, let's stretch it out and create some more space in the areas that tend to hold tension. Get your strap out and get ready for some yummy, feel-good stretches that lengthen the tissues of your neck in 360 degrees.

programme.title: Optimize Your Metabolism with Dr. Casey Means
programme.desc: Welcome to your course! Meet your teacher, Dr. Casey Means, and discover the single physiological phenomenon that can change almost everything about how you feel and function today and in the future.

programme.title: Optimize Your Metabolism with Dr. Casey Means
programme.desc: We’re in a health epidemic. 88% of American adults, as example, have at least one biomarker of metabolic dysfunction. In this lesson, Dr. Casey explains what bad energy is, how we got so sick as a society, and the three core symptoms of bad energy to look out for in your own life.

programme.title: Optimize Your Metabolism with Dr. Casey Means
programme.sub-title: Eating for Good Energy & Healthy Metabolism
programme.desc: Let’s tackle the biggest question we all want to know the answer to – what the heck should I eat if I want to have a healthy metabolism? What diet is best? Introducing: Dr. Casey Means’ eating plan. Good news: it’s simple!

programme.title: Vinyasa for Life
programme.sub-title: Vinyasa for Life: Easing into Back Bending
programme.desc: Establish long term success for your practice by learning about one of the most crucial body parts in yoga—your spine. In this class Schuyler teaches you how to backbend safely, followed by three practical applications. Class ends with a soothing restorative posture. Body awareness never felt so good.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your Day 1 practice offers an invitation to slow down and take stock.

programme.title: Break Out of the Addiction Frequency
programme.sub-title: Section 1: The Addiction Frequency & The Power of Breath
programme.desc: Breathing is the single most important thing we do. Addiction is characterized by a sense of lack, of missing something. And when you breathe poorly, like when anxious or angry, you’re caught up in your head and aren’t breathing well and that sends a signal to your body that perpetuates the addiction frequency. Deep, long breathing is how we interrupt this pattern.

programme.title: Hacking Your Healthcare
programme.sub-title: Day 1: Health Care vs. Sick Care
programme.desc: Today, we talk about a revolutionary approach to health called Functional Medicine, and how you can have a healthy doctor-patient relationship.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson
programme.sub-title: Relationships: Relationships and Your Spiritual Journey
programme.desc: Today's lesson is a bit of a reality check, as we'll begin to question the current way we look at relationships, romantic or not. How we see ourselves and our relationship to God influences our view of our relationships with other people. Today we're going to examine that view from a place of love.

programme.title: Live Fearlessly with Anita Moorjani
programme.sub-title: Welcome to Live Fearlessly with Anita Moorjani
programme.desc: In this course, Anita Moorjani guides you toward loving yourself as if your life depends on it – because it does! When love (rather than fear) determines your life, you will recognize what is truly important for you to be happy and healthy.

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.desc: As humans, we are constantly struggling between the poles of what we think we want and what is. When we lose touch with the truth of what is, we create and compound our suffering. What narratives are you constructing? Are they in conflict with the truth of the situation? Are you struggling with what is?

programme.title: The Wellness Master Class
programme.sub-title: The Wellness Master Class: Energy & Motivation
programme.desc: As we prepare for Day 1 tomorrow, celebrate yourself for setting out on the path to lasting, exuberant wellness. Come to the course with an open mind for earnest personal dialogue and you’ll lay the groundwork for better performance, better experiences, and true depth to your life.

programme.title: The Nature of Reality with Deepak Chopra
programme.sub-title: The Nature of Reality: The Science of Reality
programme.desc: What is real? How do we know it's real, and how does that deeper understanding of reality help us fulfill our dreams, desires, and intentions? So let's go for it.

programme.desc: Your Day 1 practice offers an invitation to slow down and take stock.

programme.title: Break Out of the Addiction Frequency
programme.sub-title: Section 1: The Addiction Frequency & The Power of Breath
programme.desc: Breathing is the single most important thing we do. Addiction is characterized by a sense of lack, of missing something. And when you breathe poorly, like when anxious or angry, you’re caught up in your head and aren’t breathing well and that sends a signal to your body that perpetuates the addiction frequency. Deep, long breathing is how we interrupt this pattern.

programme.title: Hacking Your Healthcare
programme.sub-title: Day 1: Health Care vs. Sick Care
programme.desc: Today, we talk about a revolutionary approach to health called Functional Medicine, and how you can have a healthy doctor-patient relationship.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson
programme.sub-title: Relationships: Relationships and Your Spiritual Journey
programme.desc: Today's lesson is a bit of a reality check, as we'll begin to question the current way we look at relationships, romantic or not. How we see ourselves and our relationship to God influences our view of our relationships with other people. Today we're going to examine that view from a place of love.

programme.title: Live Fearlessly with Anita Moorjani
programme.sub-title: Welcome to Live Fearlessly with Anita Moorjani
programme.desc: In this course, Anita Moorjani guides you toward loving yourself as if your life depends on it – because it does! When love (rather than fear) determines your life, you will recognize what is truly important for you to be happy and healthy.

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.desc: As humans, we are constantly struggling between the poles of what we think we want and what is. When we lose touch with the truth of what is, we create and compound our suffering. What narratives are you constructing? Are they in conflict with the truth of the situation? Are you struggling with what is?

programme.title: The Wellness Master Class
programme.sub-title: The Wellness Master Class: Energy & Motivation
programme.desc: As we prepare for Day 1 tomorrow, celebrate yourself for setting out on the path to lasting, exuberant wellness. Come to the course with an open mind for earnest personal dialogue and you’ll lay the groundwork for better performance, better experiences, and true depth to your life.
